title: BI & Data Engineer
full_description: <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Position Summary</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">The BI &amp; Data Applications Engineer is an experienced BI and data engineering professional responsible for building and maintaining Focus's data consumption layer — the reports, dashboards, and interactive applications that let the business work directly with data in Snowflake. This role spans two connected disciplines: traditional Power BI report development and platform administration built on top of Snowflake semantic models, and hands-on development of interactive data applications (e.g., Streamlit in Snowflake, and custom React + FastAPI applications hosted natively in Snowflake). You'll use AI-assisted development tools such as GitHub Copilot to accelerate delivery, and partner closely with data engineers and analytics engineers who build the underlying semantic models. The ideal candidate is comfortable moving between report design, platform administration, and full-stack application development, with a strong focus on making data genuinely usable for business stakeholders.</span></p> <p><strong><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">This role is hybrid with 3 days/week onsite in St. Louis.</span></strong></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Primary Responsibilities</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>BI Reporting &amp; Semantic Model Consumption: </strong>Design, build, and maintain Power BI reports and dashboards built on top of Snowflake semantic models and semantic views, ensuring reporting is accurate, performant, and aligned to business needs.</span></p> </li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Power BI Platform Administration: </strong>Own Power BI tenant administration, including workspace governance, row-level security (RLS), capacity management, gateway configuration, and DirectQuery performance tuning against Snowflake.</span></p> </li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Data Application Development: </strong>Design, build, and maintain interactive data applications directly in Snowflake, using Streamlit in Snowflake and custom container-based applications (React frontend with a FastAPI backend) via Snowpark Container Services, enabling business users to interact with data beyond static dashboards.</span></p> </li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>AI-Assisted Development: </strong>Leverage AI-assisted coding tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot) to accelerate development of reports, applications, and backend services, while maintaining code quality and review standards.</span></p> </li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Cross-Functional Collaboration: </strong>Partner with data engineers and analytics engineers who build and maintain Snowflake semantic models, and work directly with business stakeholders to gather requirements and translate them into usable reporting and application experiences.</span></p> </li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Performance &amp; Access Governance: </strong>Monitor and optimize performance across Power BI reports and Snowflake-hosted applications, and manage access controls for reports, apps, and underlying datasets in coordination with data platform governance standards.</span></p> </li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Application Lifecycle &amp; Deployment: </strong>Manage the full lifecycle of BI reports and data applications, including version control (Git/GitHub), CI/CD for application deployment, testing, and release management.</span></p> </li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Required Skills</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>BI &amp; Reporting: </strong>Advanced Power BI development skills (DAX, data modeling, report design) and administration experience (workspace governance, RLS, gateways, capacity planning). Experience connecting Power BI to Snowflake via DirectQuery or Import against semantic models.</span></p> </li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Application Development: </strong>Proficiency building Streamlit applications, along with experience using React (or a similar frontend framework) and FastAPI (or a similar Python backend framework) to build custom applications. Familiarity with containerization (Docker) and deploying containerized apps, ideally within Snowflake via Snowpark Container Services.</span></p> </li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Snowflake &amp; SQL: </strong>Strong SQL skills and familiarity with Snowflake semantic models/semantic views, Cortex Analyst, and general Snowflake data structures.</span></p> </li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>AI-Assisted Development Tools: </strong>Comfort using AI coding assistants (e.g., GitHub Copilot) as part of a daily development workflow.</span></p> </li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Programming: </strong>Solid Python skills for backend and application development, and working knowledge of JavaScript/TypeScript for frontend development.</span></p> </li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Version Control &amp; CI/CD: </strong>Experience with Git/GitHub and CI/CD pipelines (e.g., GitHub Actions) for deploying applications and reports.</span></p> </li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Communication &amp; Collaboration: </strong>Strong ability to translate business requirements into technical solutions, with excellent stakeholder communication skills.</span></p> </li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Qualifications</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Education: </strong>Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related technical field, or equivalent hands-on experience.</span></p> </li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Experience: </strong>Typically 4+ years of professional experience in BI development and/or administration, with demonstrated experience expanding into application development (e.g., Streamlit or full-stack web applications).</span></p> </li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Expertise: </strong>Proven track record of owning a BI platform end-to-end and delivering interactive data applications beyond static dashboards and reports.</span></p> </li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Industry: </strong>Experience in financial services, wealth management, or other regulated industries is a plus.</span></p> </li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><strong>Working Style: </strong>Demonstrated ability to work independently, manage priorities, and take ownership of data products from requirements through ongoing support.</span></p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">This position is an exempt position. The annualized base pay range for this role is expected to be between <strong>$110,000 - $130,000</strong>.&nbsp; Actual base pay could vary based on factors including but not limited to experience, subject matter expertise, geographic location where work will be performed and the applicant's skill set.&nbsp; The base pay is just one component of the total compensation package for employees.&nbsp; Other reward may include an annual cash bonus and a comprehensive benefits package.</span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">#LI-KJ2</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>About Focus Financial Partners</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Focus is a leading financial services firm comprised of integrated wealth management, family office, and business management services. Blending deep expertise and expansive resources with a boutique, client-first fiduciary philosophy, Focus helps individuals, families, and institutions navigate complex financial situations with highly personalized solutions tailored to their unique needs. If reasonable accommodation is needed to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and/or to receive other benefits and privileges of employment, please contact <a href="mailto:careers@focuspartners.com">careers@focuspartners.com</a>.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 8pt;"><strong><em>The following language is for US based roles only</em></strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 8pt;"><strong>For California Applicants:&nbsp;</strong><span data-teams="true">Information on your California privacy rights can be found</span><strong><span data-teams="true"> <a id="menur4dt" class="fui-Link ___1q1shib f2hkw1w f3rmtva f1ewtqcl fyind8e f1k6fduh f1w7gpdv fk6fouc fjoy568 figsok6 f1s184ao f1mk8lai fnbmjn9 f1o700av f13mvf36 f1cmlufx f9n3di6 f1ids18y f1tx3yz7 f1deo86v f1eh06m1 f1iescvh fhgqx19 f1olyrje f1p93eir f1nev41a f1h8hb77 f1lqvz6u f10aw75t fsle3fq f17ae5zn" href="https://focus-financial.files.svdcdn.com/production/documents/Privacy-Notice-Personnel-Supplement-for-CA-residents-Jan-1-2025-Final-Clean.pdf?dm=1740065249" target="_blank">here</a></span></strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 8pt;"><strong>For Indiana Applicants: </strong>It is unlawful for an employer to discriminate against a prospective employee on the basis of status as a veteran by refusing to employ an applicant on the basis that they are a veteran of the armed forces of the United States, a member of the Indiana National Guard or a member of a reserve component.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 8pt;"><strong>For Maryland Applicants: </strong>I UNDERSTAND THAT UNDER MARYLAND LAW, AN EMPLOYER MAY NOT REQUIRE OR DEMAND, AS A CONDITION OF EMPLOYMENT, PROSPECTIVE EMPLOYMENT OR CONTINUED EMPLOYMENT, THAT ANY INDIVIDUAL SUBMIT TO OR TAKE A POLYGRAP OR SIMILAR TEST.&nbsp; title: Data Engineer
location: New York, New York, United States
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Courier Health is on a mission to solve one of the biggest and most meaningful opportunities in healthcare: reinvent how people living with chronic and rare diseases are supported.</p> <p>We are building the future of patient engagement for life sciences companies. Our software is leveraged by biopharma companies to support patients in their complex journey from diagnosis to initiating and remaining on therapy to achieve optimal health outcomes.</p></div><p><strong>About the Team</strong></p> <p>You'll join an early and growing data engineering team that's shaping the foundations of our data platform. We're investing in a modern transformation layer, reliable pipelines, and richer in-product analytics for our clients and you'll have real influence over how that gets built.</p> <p><strong>About the Role</strong></p> <p>You'll be one of the first data engineers on our team. This is hands-on, high-ownership work: building our transformation layer, strengthening our analytics pipelines, and creating the data models that power both internal reporting and the analytics our clients see inside the product.</p> <p><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Build data models:</strong> develop dbt models and SQL transformations, backed by tests, that turn raw data into reliable datasets.</li> <li><strong>Improve pipeline reliability:</strong> help monitor our replication and orchestrated pipelines, investigate data issues, and add quality checks.</li> <li><strong>Power reporting:</strong> build and refine the datasets and dashboards that internal teams and clients rely on.</li> <li><strong>Learn and grow:</strong> work closely with senior engineers, take part in code review, and steadily take on more ownership.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Who You Are</strong></p> <p><em>We're open on exact tools — we care about fundamentals and trajectory. You'll likely have most of the following:</em></p> <ul> <li>3-5 years of professional data engineering experience</li> <li><strong>Strong SQL:</strong> you write correct, readable SQL and understand relational data modeling</li> <li><strong>Data experience:</strong> you've developed data pipelines and transformations in production environments</li> <li><strong>Eagerness to learn:</strong> you take feedback well, ask good questions, and are excited to grow as a data engineer</li> </ul> <p><em>Nice to have: exposure to dbt, CDC / replication or orchestration tools (e.g. Estuary Flow, Debezium/Kafka, Airflow), a cloud data warehouse (ex. Redshift), a BI tool (ex. Sigma, Looker); comfort with PostgreSQL or a similar database.</em></p> <h4>Our stack</h4> <ul> <li><strong>Databases:</strong> PostgreSQL across our production and analytics environments, with room to grow into a cloud warehouse (ex. Redshift) as we scale</li> <li><strong>Ingestion:</strong> CDC / streaming replication into analytics (evaluating tools like Estuary Flow and Debezium/Kafka)</li> <li><strong>Transformation:</strong> building out a version-controlled, dbt-based staging/marts layer with data tests and CI/CD</li> <li><strong>Orchestration:</strong> scheduled, observable pipeline runs (e.g. Airflow or similar)</li> <li><strong>BI &amp; embedded analytics:</strong> a modern BI and embedding platform (we use Sigma) for internal reporting and in-product client analytics, with a maturing semantic/metrics layer</li> <li><strong>Domain:</strong> life sciences / healthcare data; comfort working in HIPAA-aware, PHI-handling environments is a plus</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Benefits</strong></h3> <ul> <li>100% paid employee health benefit options (including medical, dental, and vision)</li> <li>401(k) with employer funded match</li> <li>Unlimited Vacation</li> <li>Commuter Benefits</li> <li>Paid parental leave</li> <li>Catered lunch on Fridays</li> <li>Wellness stipend</li> </ul> <p>The annual salary range for the target level for this role is $120,000-$150,000 + equity + benefits, including medical, dental, and vision. Final compensation will be determined based on a variety of factors including relevant experience, interview performance, and internal equity.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p>Courier Health is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer.</p> <p>We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.</p></div>

title: Senior Data Engineer
location: New York, New York, United States
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Courier Health is on a mission to solve one of the biggest and most meaningful opportunities in healthcare: reinvent how people living with chronic and rare diseases are supported.</p> <p>We are building the future of patient engagement for life sciences companies. Our software is leveraged by biopharma companies to support patients in their complex journey from diagnosis to initiating and remaining on therapy to achieve optimal health outcomes.</p></div><p><strong>About the Team</strong></p> <p>You'll join an early and growing data engineering team that's shaping the foundations of our data platform. We're investing in a modern transformation layer, reliable pipelines, and richer in-product analytics for our clients and you'll have real influence over how that gets built.</p> <p><strong>About the Role</strong></p> <p>You'll be one of the first data engineers on our team. This is hands-on, high-ownership work: building our transformation layer, strengthening our analytics pipelines, and creating the data models that power both internal reporting and the analytics our clients see inside the product.</p> <p><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Build and strengthen pipelines:</strong> improve the reliability and observability of how data flows into analytics data platforms, and reason clearly about when added complexity is worth it versus premature.</li> <li><strong>Expert SQL and data modeling:</strong> you model data well for analytics and can guide others in doing the same.</li> <li><strong>Reliable production pipelines:</strong> you've built and operated critical production data pipelines and understand their real-world failure modes.</li> <li><strong>Technical leadership:</strong> you raise the bar for other engineers through architecture, standards, and mentorship.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Our Stack</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Databases:</strong> PostgreSQL across our production and analytics environments, with room to grow into a cloud warehouse as we scale</li> <li><strong>Ingestion:</strong> CDC / streaming tests and CI/CD</li> <li><strong>Orchestration:</strong> scheduled, observable pipeline runs (e.g. Airflow or similar)</li> <li><strong>BI &amp; embedded analytics:</strong> a modern BI and embedding platform (we use Sigma) for internal reporting and in-product client analytics, with a maturing semantic/metrics layer</li> <li><strong>Domain:</strong> life sciences / healthcare data; comfort working in HIPAA-aware, PHI-handling environments is a plus</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Benefits</strong></h3> <ul> <li>100% paid employee health benefit options (including medical, dental, and vision)</li> <li>401(k) with employer funded match</li> <li>Unlimited Vacation</li> <li>Commuter Benefits</li> <li>Paid parental leave</li> <li>Catered lunch on Fridays</li> <li>Wellness stipend</li> </ul> <p>The annual salary range for the target level for this role is $175,000- $225,000 + equity + benefits, including medical, dental, and vision. Final compensation will be determined based on a variety of factors including relevant experience, interview performance, and internal equity.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p>Courier Health is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer.</p> <p>We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.</p></div>

title: Data Engineer III
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>Garner’s mission is to transform the healthcare economy, delivering high-quality and affordable care for all.&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>We are fundamentally reimagining how healthcare works in the U.S. by partnering with employers to redesign healthcare benefits using clear incentives and powerful, data-driven insights. Our approach guides employees to higher-quality, lower-cost care, creating a system that works better for everyone. Patients achieve better health outcomes, employers spend healthcare dollars more effectively, and physicians are rewarded for delivering exceptional care rather than performing more procedures.&nbsp;</p> <p>Garner is one of the fastest-growing healthcare technology companies in the country. Our products are trusted by the most sophisticated employers and providers in the industry, and we are building a team of talented, mission-driven individuals who are motivated to make a meaningful impact on healthcare at scale.</p></div><p><strong>About the role:</strong></p> <p>We are seeking an exceptional Data Engineer III to join our Engineering team, with a high sense of ownership who is excited about our mission, eager to learn and teach others, and can deliver across the tech stack. The ideal candidate should have experience with a modern data stack and implementations of data pipelines using Python and SQL in AWS.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Where you will work:</strong></p> <p>This role will be based in our New York City office. You must be willing to work in the office 3 days per week on Tuesday, Wednesday and Thursday.</p> <p><strong>What you will do:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Build, optimize, and maintain data pipelines that power our business</li> <li>Define and build out abstracted reusable data sets to be used for Business Intelligence, Marketing, and Data Science Research</li> <li>Design, build, and evangelize a federated data validation framework to be used to monitor potential data inconsistencies</li> <li>Protect our users’ privacy and security through best practices</li> </ul> <p><strong>The ideal candidate has:</strong></p> <ul> <li>2+ years of software/data engineering experience (distributed data processing, data warehousing, data governance, Big Data, data variance, data privacy, and data quality).</li> <li>Expertise in SQL and Python</li> <li>Expertise in building scalable data pipelines, query optimization, data modeling, and defining reusable datasets</li> <li>Experience working with orchestration tools (especially Airflow), databases (especially PostgreSQL), data warehouses (especially Snowflake)</li> <li>Familiarity with SQL tuning, medallion/event-driven architectures, and telemetry.</li> <li>Familiarity with healthcare or insurance</li> <li>Familiarity with data security and HIPPA compliance</li> <li>A desire to be a part of a high-performing, mission-driven team that operates with intense urgency, a strong sense of individual accountability, and a commitment to authentic feedback</li> </ul> <p><strong>Technologies we use:</strong></p> <p>Postgres/SQL, Snowflake, Python, AWS, Terraform, Argo, Airflow, Spark, DuckDB, Iceberg, Airbyte, DBT, ElasticSearch (aka OpenSearch), OpenTelemetry, Looker</p> <p>This is a unique opportunity to join a fast-growing company in a transformative role, helping shape the future of healthcare.</p> <p><strong>Please note: we are unable to sponsor or take over sponsorship of an employment visa at this time.</strong></p> <p><strong>Compensation Transparency:</strong></p> <p>The target salary range for this position is $<span data-sheets-root="1">166,000 - $205,000</span>. Individual compensation for this role will depend on various factors, including qualifications, skills, and applicable laws. In addition to base compensation, this role is eligible to participate in our equity incentive and competitive benefits plans, including but not limited to: flexible PTO, Medical/Dental/Vision plan options, 401(k) with company match, flexible spending accounts, Teladoc Health and more.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><div> <h3><strong>Fraud and Security Notice:&nbsp;</strong></h3> <p>Please be aware of recent job scam attempts. Our recruiters use <a href="http://getgarner.com/">getgarner.com</a> and <a href="garnerhealth.com">garnerhealth.com</a> email domains exclusively. If you have been contacted by someone claiming to be a Garner recruiter or a hiring manager from a different domain about a potential job, please report it to law enforcement <a href="https://www.ic3.gov/Home/ComplaintChoice">here</a> and to <a href="mailto:candidateprotection@getgarner.com">candidateprotection@garnerhealth.com</a>.</p> <h3><strong>Equal Employment Opportunity:</strong></h3> Garner Health is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer and values diversity in the workplace. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, reproductive health decisions, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, genetic information, political views or activity, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. <p>Garner Health is committed to providing accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities in our recruiting process. If you need assistance or an accommodation due to a disability, you may contact us at <a href="mailto:talent@getgarner.com">talent@garnerhealth.com</a>.&nbsp;</p> </div></div>

Our recruiters use <a href="http://getgarner.com/">getgarner.com</a> and <a href="garnerhealth.com">garnerhealth.com</a> email domains exclusively. If you have been contacted by someone claiming to be a Garner recruiter or a hiring manager from a different domain about a potential job, please report it to law enforcement <a href="https://www.ic3.gov/Home/ComplaintChoice">here</a> and to <a href="mailto:candidateprotection@getgarner.com">candidateprotection@garnerhealth.com</a>.</p> <h3><strong>Equal Employment Opportunity:</strong></h3> Garner Health is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer and values diversity in the workplace. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, reproductive health decisions, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, genetic information, political views or activity, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. <p>Garner Health is committed to providing accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities in our recruiting process. If you need assistance or an accommodation due to a disability, you may contact us at <a href="mailto:talent@getgarner.com">talent@garnerhealth.com</a>.&nbsp;</p> </div></div>

title: Sr. Data Engineer I
location: United States of America - Remote / Home Office
full_description: <p><strong><u>Job Description&nbsp;</u></strong></p> <p>We are looking for a Senior Data Engineer to help evolve and scale our modern data ecosystem, including our data lake, data warehouse, and machine-learning enablement platforms. This role will contribute to the company’s data-driven culture, bring innovative approaches to cloud-native engineering, and help advance our MLOps capabilities to support production-grade AI/ML initiatives. You will collaborate closely with data scientists, analytics engineers, and cross-functional partners to deliver reliable, high-quality data and operationalized machine-learning solutions.</p> <p><strong><u>Responsibilities</u></strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>Designs and builds scalable data extracts, integrations, transformations, and data models.</p> </li> <li> <p>Ensures successful deployment and provisioning of data solutions across required environments.</p> </li> <li> <p>Designs and implements data architectures and applications that enable speed, quality, and operational efficiency.</p> </li> <li> <p>Interacts with cross-functional stakeholders to gather and define requirements and translate them into technical designs.</p> </li> <li> <p>Develops deep familiarity with enterprise datasets, builds domain knowledge, and advances data quality.</p> </li> <li> <p>Reviews requirements, identifies gaps, and drives resolution with stakeholders.</p> </li> <li> <p>Identifies and recommends continuous improvement opportunities, ensuring integrations are automated, governed, and observable.</p> </li> <li> <p>Serves as a key team member in designing and deploying a ground-up cloud data platform and pipeline.</p> </li> <li> <p>Partners with data scientists to design, build, and maintain reproducible machine-learning pipelines, including feature engineering, model training, validation, deployment, and monitoring.</p> </li> <li> <p>Implements CI/CD for data and ML workflows (model packaging, automated testing, environment management, release automation).</p> </li> <li> <p>Builds and maintains production-grade ML infrastructure such as feature stores, model registries, data versioning, and experiment tracking frameworks (e.g., MLflow).</p> </li> <li> <p>Ensures ML models follow best-practice governance, including automated model performance monitoring, drift detection, logging, observability, and alerting.</p> </li> <li> <p>Designs scalable data pipelines optimized for ML workloads, such as batch, streaming, and real-time inference use cases.</p> </li> <li> <p>Establishes MLOps standards, coding practices, and automation patterns that scale across teams.<br>&nbsp;</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong><u>Qualifications</u></strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>Bachelor or Master`s degree in technical discipline such as Computer Science, Information Systems or another technical field</p> </li> <li> <p>People person, team player with a strong can-do mentality</p> </li> <li> <p>5+ years of experience as a Data Engineer within a data and analytics environment.</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong interpersonal skills with a collaborative, proactive, and solution-driven mindset.</p> </li> <li> <p>Proficiency in data modeling concepts and techniques.</p> </li> <li> <p>Expertise with Databricks and other cloud data warehousing solutions such as S3, Redshift, or BigQuery.</p> </li> <li> <p>Hands-on experience building data pipelines and ETL/ELT workflows using PySpark for semi-structured data (merge, delete, combine, wrangling).</p> </li> <li> <p>Advanced knowledge of Python and advanced working SQL skills including query optimization.</p> </li> <li> <p>Ability to write, test, and debug RESTful APIs.</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience working in agile, cross-functional environments.</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong analytical, problem-solving, and critical-thinking capabilities.</p> </li> <li> <p>Ability to guide junior engineers and contribute to technical design reviews.</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong communication skills with the ability to present complex concepts clearly.</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience in data quality initiatives such as Master Data Management (MDM).</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience operationalizing machine-learning models in production environments.</p> </li> <li> <p>Hands-on experience with ML tooling such as MLflow, SageMaker, Databricks ML, Kubeflow, or similar.</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience implementing CI/CD pipelines for data and ML workloads, including automated testing, deployment pipelines, and environment configuration.</p> </li> <li> <p>Understanding of model lifecycle management, data versioning, feature store design, and model monitoring concepts.</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience containerizing ML workloads using Docker and deploying them via cloud-native services or orchestrators.</p> </li> <li> <p>Familiarity with monitoring frameworks, experiment tracking, and performance observability for ML models.</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong><u>Highly Desired AWS certifications (any):</u></strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>DevOps experience with CICD &amp; unit/integration testing, Docker containerization, workflow orchestration</p> </li> <li> <p>Databricks certifications – Associate/Professional</p> </li> <li> <p>AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate/Professional</p> </li> <li> <p>AWS Certified Developer – Associate/Professional</p> </li> <li> <p>AWS Certified DevOps Engineer&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>AWS Certified Solutions Architect&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>AWS Certified Data Analytics</p> </li> <li> <p>AWS Certified Security - Specialty</p> </li> <li> <p>AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner</p> </li> </ul> <p>#LI-JC1</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><hr><span style="font-size: 14px;">The anticipated pay scale for this position can be found below, however the pay range applicable to you may vary by geographic location based on where the job is located or where you work.&nbsp; The final pay offered to a successful candidate will be dependent on several factors that may include but are not limited to the type and years of experience within the job, the type of years and experience within the industry, education, etc.&nbsp; iHerb, LLC is a multi-state employer and this pay scale may not reflect positions that work in other states or locations.</span><br><br><span style="font-size: 14px;">Employees (and their families) that meet eligibility criteria as outlined in applicable plan documents are eligible to participate in our medical, dental, vision, and basic life insurance programs and may enroll in our company’s 401(k) plan. Employees will also be eligible for Time Off and Paid Sick Leave pursuant to the company’s policies. Employees will enjoy paid holidays throughout the calendar year.&nbsp; Eligibility requirements for these benefits will be controlled by applicable plan documents.<br><br></span> <div title: Analytics Engineer
full_description: <p>Scopely is seeking a highly motivated&nbsp;<strong>Analytics Engineer</strong> to join our Strategy &amp; Business Operations team in Barcelona on a 2 day a week hybrid basis!&nbsp;</p> <p>At Scopely, we care deeply about what we do and want to inspire play every day - whether in our work environments alongside our talented colleagues or through our deep connections with our communities of players. We are a global team of game lovers who are developing, publishing, and innovating the mobile games industry, connecting millions of people worldwide daily.&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <p>The Strategy and Business Operations team works closely with the Senior Leadership of Scopely to answer critical business-related questions. By acting as a strategic partner, the team translates complex data into actionable insights that drive the company's decision-making process and long-term growth.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>What You’ll Do &nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Lead and collaborate with engineers, product teams, and analysts to develop self-serve insight products that are responsive, precise, and scalable at petabyte levels</li> <li>Oversee the entire data product lifecycle, including designing new tracking plans, developing data models, ELT pipelines, and self-serve insight products like Looker explores and dashboards</li> <li>Act as a guardian of data quality, ensuring consistent metric reporting across a wide range of data products</li> <li>Utilize cutting-edge technology stack including BigQuery, dbt and Looker</li> <li>Provide technical leadership and partner with our stakeholders and their teams to enhance their daily operations and product success.</li> <li>Bring expertise in a specific part of the data stack and lifecycle while contributing broadly across all aspects</li> <li>Mentor team members and drive the adoption of best practices within the team</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>What We’re Looking For&nbsp;&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>A strong passion for solving complex analytical puzzles</li> <li>Proven ability to translate business needs into advanced analytics solutions</li> <li>Deep expertise with the modern data stack (BigQuery, Snowflake, dbt, Looker, Airflow, GitHub, Terraform, command line-based workflows)</li> <li>Exceptional SQL skills coupled with at least 3-4 years of relevant experience in data analytics or engineering roles</li> <li>Demonstrate a solid proficiency in Python, with the ability to write clean, maintainable scripts to automate data workflows, perform exploratory data analysis and integrate various data sources within our modern tech stack.</li> <li>Solid understanding of data modeling principles (e.g., Kimball methodology, star schemas)</li> <li>A high valuation of business context and the drive to achieve technical excellence</li> <li>An inclination towards collaboration and pride in contributing to high-functioning teams</li> <li>Enjoyment in working within fast-paced, growth-oriented environments</li> <li>A sense of fun at work, with extracurricular interests like Ping Pong or Mario Kart seen as a bonus!</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>At Scopely, we create games for everyone - and want to ensure that the people behind our games reflect that! &nbsp; We are committed to creating a diverse, supportive work environment where everyone is treated with respect. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunities and welcome individuals from all backgrounds to join us &amp; embrace the adventure!&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <p>Employment at Scopely is based solely on a person's merit and qualifications. Scopely does not discriminate against any employee or applicant because of race, creed, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity/expression, national origin, disability, age, genetic information, veteran status, marital status, pregnancy or related condition (including breastfeeding), or any other basis protected by law. We also consider qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records, consistent with applicable federal, state and local law.</p> <p>This role will have access to sensitive and/or confidential employee or customer personally identifiable information (PII) and/or Company financial information, and therefore will be subject to background checks upon receiving a conditional offer of employment.&nbsp; &nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <p><br><br></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p>&nbsp;</p> <h3>About Scopely</h3> <p>Scopely is a leading video game and global interactive entertainment company, home to many of the world’s most beloved and enduring experiences, including two of the most successful mobile games of all-time “MONOPOLY GO!” and “Pokémon GO,” along with “Stumble Guys,” “Star Trek™ Fleet Command,” “MARVEL Strike Force,” “WWE Champions,” the Scrabble® franchise, “Yahtzee® With Buddies,” and many others. Across mobile, web, PC, and console, Scopely creates, develops, publishes, and live-operates one of the most diversified and award-winning portfolios in the games industry — bringing hundreds of millions of players together through a shared love of play.</p> <p>Founded in 2011, Scopely is powered by its exceptional team — including thousands of world-class gamemakers around the globe, a distinctive tenet-driven culture, and its proprietary technology platform, Playgami. Together, these strengths have fueled Scopely’s position as the #1 mobile games company in the U.S. and #2 globally, generating more than $10 billion in lifetime revenue. Whether building global sensations like “MONOPOLY GO!” from the ground up, or expanding through strategic acquisitions, including the FoxNext, GSN, and Niantic games businesses — Scopely consistently delivers experiences players love today and return to for years to come.</p> <p>Recognized multiple times as one of the "100 Most Influential Companies in the World" by TIME magazine and one of Fast Company's "World's Most Innovative Companies" and “Best Workplaces for Innovators,” Scopely believes that video games can be a force for good — creating meaningful connections, vibrant communities, and making life better through play.</p> <p>Scopely has global operations and partners across four continents in more than a dozen countries worldwide. For more information, visit: <a href="https://www.scopely.com/">https://www.scopely.com/</a>.&nbsp;</p> <p>Notice to Candidates: Scopely will never request payment or financial information during the application or hiring process. Please apply only through our official <a href="http://scopely.com">website</a> and verify that all Talent Partner communications come from an email address ending in @<a href="http://scopely.com">scopely.com</a>.</p> <p>Should you have any questions or encounter any fraudulent requests/emails/websites, please immediately contact recruiting@scopely.com. Our job applicant privacy policies are available here: <a href="https://www.scopely.com/en/job-applicant-privacy-notice-for-ca-residents">California Privacy Notice</a> and <a href="https://www.scopely.com/en/eea-and-uk-job-applicant-privacy-notice">EEA/UK Privacy Notice</a>.</p> <p>Employment at Scopely is based solely on a person's merit and qualifications. Scopely does not discriminate against any employee or applicant because of race, creed, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity/expression, national origin, disability, age, genetic information, veteran status, marital status, pregnancy or related condition (including breastfeeding), or any other basis protected by law. We also consider qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records, consistent with applicable federal, state and local law.</p></div>

title: Director of Analytics Engineering
full_description: <p>Scopely is looking for a <strong>Director of Analytics Engineering</strong> to lead our <strong>Game Insight</strong> team in&nbsp;Barcelona!</p> <p>At Scopely, we are passionate about creating engaging experiences for millions of players&nbsp;worldwide. Our teams build and operate some of the most successful mobile games, supported&nbsp;by a modern data platform that enables analytics, insights, and data-driven decisions across the&nbsp;company.</p> <p>Playgami is building a best-in-class SaaS gaming platform, and data is a core pillar. The Game&nbsp;Insight team plays a key role in enabling game teams to make better, faster, and more&nbsp;consistent decisions through trusted data products, scalable analytical foundations, and close partnership with analytics and business stakeholders.</p> <p><strong>What You'll Do</strong></p> <p>This is a senior leadership role focused on scaling analytic engineering capabilities across&nbsp;Scopely’s game portfolio while helping shape the broader Analytic Engineering strategy across&nbsp;the company. You will lead a team of managers and senior analytic engineers responsible for&nbsp;delivering trusted data products, scalable analytics foundations, and consistent business metrics&nbsp;that empower game teams to make data-driven decisions.</p> <ul> <li>Lead and grow the Game Insight team, managing managers and senior individual contributors</li> <li>Define and execute the vision, strategy, and roadmap for Analytic Engineering within the Game Insight organization</li> <li>Partner with the Director of Analytics for Core Insight to shape the broader Analytic Engineering strategy across Scopely</li> <li>Collaborate with Data Products and Data Platform leadership to align the company's data strategy and investments</li> <li>Build a high-performing organization through hiring, coaching, succession planning, and organizational design</li> <li>Own the quality, consistency, and scalability of analytical data products, business metrics, and semantic layers supporting game teams</li> <li>Drive standardization of analytical foundations and metric definitions across games while balancing local business needs</li> <li>Partner with Analytics, Product, Engineering, and Business stakeholders to deliver scalable data solutions and trusted insights</li> <li>Establish effective ways of working across Analytics, Data Products, Data Platform, Governance, and Engineering teams</li> <li>Represent Analytic Engineering in strategic planning, prioritization, and executive discussions</li> <li>Identify opportunities to simplify workflows, improve data usability, and increase the impact of data across Scopely</li> </ul> <p><strong>Scope</strong></p> <ul> <li>Analytic Engineering strategy and standards across game-facing domains</li> <li>Analytical data products, semantic layers, and business metrics supporting Scopely's game portfolio</li> <li>Cross-game standardization of analytics foundations and KPI governanceOrganizational leadership and talent development within the Game Insight team</li> <li>Cross-functional alignment with Analytics, Data Products, Data Platform, Governance, and Engineering teams</li> <li>Scalable, reliable, and trusted analytical data products</li> </ul> <p><strong>What We're Looking For</strong></p> <ul> <li>10+ years of experience in analytics engineering, data engineering, business intelligence, analytics platform, or related data leadership roles</li> <li>5+ years of experience managing and developing analytics, data, or engineering teams</li> <li>Experience leading managers and building high-performing organizations</li> <li>Strong understanding of analytic engineering principles, including data modeling, metric design, semantic layers, testing, and governance</li> <li>Experience with modern data stack technologies such as BigQuery, DBT, Looker, Airflow, or equivalent platforms</li> <li>Proven ability to define strategy, influence stakeholders, and translate vision into execution</li> <li>Experience leading large-scale transformation, standardization, or platform adoption initiatives</li> <li>Strong organizational leadership skills, including planning, prioritization, stakeholder management, and talent development</li> <li>Ability to balance technical depth with business impact and organizational effectiveness</li> <li>Strong communication skills and ability to work effectively across technical and non-technical teams</li> <li>Experience operating in complex, fast-moving environments with multiple stakeholders</li> <li>Full on-site presence in the Barcelona office (5 days per week)</li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice to Have</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience in gaming, mobile products, or free-to-play business models</li> <li>Familiarity with game analytics concepts such as player behavior, economy, monetization, progression, live operations, and experimentation</li> <li>Experience working with high-scale event data and large data volumes</li> <li>Experience with KPI governance, semantic layers, or centralized metrics frameworks</li> <li>Experience partnering with product analytics, data science, experimentation, or machine learning teams</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>At Scopely, we create games for everyone, and want to ensure that the people behind our&nbsp; games reflect that! We are committed to creating a diverse, supportive work environment where&nbsp;everyone is treated with respect. We are committed to providing equal employment&nbsp;opportunities and welcome individuals from all backgrounds to join us and embrace the&nbsp;adventure!</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p>&nbsp;</p> <h3>About Scopely</h3> <p>Scopely is a leading video game and global interactive entertainment company, home to many of the world’s most beloved and enduring experiences, including two of the most successful mobile games of all-time “MONOPOLY GO!” and “Pokémon GO,” along with “Stumble Guys,” “Star Trek™ Fleet Command,” “MARVEL Strike Force,” “WWE Champions,” the Scrabble® franchise, “Yahtzee® With Buddies,” and many others. Across mobile, web, PC, and console, Scopely creates, develops, publishes, and live-operates one of the most diversified and award-winning portfolios in the games industry — bringing hundreds of millions of players together through a shared love of play.</p> <p>Founded in 2011, Scopely is powered by its exceptional team — including thousands of world-class gamemakers around the globe, a distinctive tenet-driven culture, and its proprietary technology platform, Playgami. Together, these strengths have fueled Scopely’s position as the #1 mobile games company in the U.S. and #2 globally, generating more than $10 billion in lifetime revenue. Whether building global sensations like “MONOPOLY GO!” from the ground up, or expanding through strategic acquisitions, including the FoxNext, GSN, and Niantic games businesses — Scopely consistently delivers experiences players love today and return to for years to come.</p> <p>Recognized multiple times as one of the "100 Most Influential Companies in the World" by TIME magazine and one of Fast Company's "World's Most Innovative Companies" and “Best Workplaces for Innovators,” Scopely believes that video games can be a force for good — creating meaningful connections, vibrant communities, and making life better through play.</p> <p>Scopely has global operations and partners across four continents in more than a dozen countries worldwide. For more information, visit: <a href="https://www.scopely.com/">https://www.scopely.com/</a>.&nbsp;</p> <p>Notice to Candidates: Scopely will never request payment or financial information during the application or hiring process. Please apply only through our official <a href="http://scopely.com">website</a> and verify that all Talent Partner communications come from an email address ending in @<a href="http://scopely.com">scopely.com</a>.</p> <p>Should you have any questions or encounter any fraudulent requests/emails/websites, please immediately contact recruiting@scopely.com. Our job applicant privacy policies are available here: <a href="https://www.scopely.com/en/job-applicant-privacy-notice-for-ca-residents">California Privacy Notice</a> and <a href="https://www.scopely.com/en/eea-and-uk-job-applicant-privacy-notice">EEA/UK Privacy Notice</a>.</p> <p>Employment at Scopely is based solely on a person's merit and qualifications. Scopely does not discriminate against any employee or applicant because of race, creed, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity/expression, national origin, disability, age, genetic information, veteran status, marital status, pregnancy or related condition (including breastfeeding), or any other basis protected by law. We also consider qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records, consistent with applicable federal, state and local law.</p></div>

title: Senior Analytics Engineer
full_description: <p>Scopely is seeking a highly motivated&nbsp;<strong>Senior Analytics Engineer</strong>&nbsp;to join our Playgami team in&nbsp;<strong>Mexico City on a hybrid basis</strong>!&nbsp;</p> <p>At Scopely, we care deeply about what we do and want to inspire play every day - whether in our work environments alongside our talented colleagues or through our deep connections with our communities of players. We are a global team of game lovers who are developing, publishing, and innovating the mobile games industry, connecting millions of people worldwide daily. &nbsp;</p> <p>Playgami is building the best SaaS gaming platform ever! The team strives to build the world’s best products for game production, operation, and insights. Powering many award-winning, loved-by-millions franchise games over mobile, web, and PC.&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <div><strong>What You’ll Do&nbsp;</strong>&nbsp;</div> <ul> <li>Lead and collaborate with engineers, product teams, and analysts to develop self-serve insight products that are responsive, precise, and scalable at petabyte levels</li> <li>Oversee the entire data product lifecycle, including designing new tracking plans, developing data models, ELT pipelines, and self-serve insight products like Looker explores and dashboards</li> <li>Act as a guardian of data quality, ensuring consistent metric reporting across a wide range of data products</li> <li>Utilize cutting-edge technology stack including BigQuery, dbt and Looker</li> <li>Provide technical leadership and empathize with game product teams and departments to enhance their daily operations and product success</li> <li>Bring expertise in a specific part of the data stack and lifecycle while contributing broadly across all aspects</li> <li>Mentor team members and drive the adoption of best practices within the team</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>What We’re Looking For &nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>A strong passion for solving complex analytical puzzles</li> <li>Proven ability to translate business needs into advanced analytics solutions</li> <li>Deep expertise with the modern data stack (BigQuery, Snowflake, dbt, Looker, Airflow, GitHub, command line-based workflows)</li> <li>Exceptional SQL skills coupled with at least 5 years of relevant experience in data analytics or engineering roles</li> <li>Solid understanding of data modeling principles (e.g., Kimball methodology, star schemas)</li> <li>A high valuation of business context and the drive to achieve technical excellence</li> <li>An inclination towards collaboration and pride in contributing to high-functioning teams</li> <li>Enjoyment in working within fast-paced, growth-oriented environments</li> <li>A sense of fun at work, with extracurricular interests like Ping Pong or Mario Kart seen as a bonus!</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>At Scopely, we create games for everyone - and want to ensure that the people behind our games reflect that! &nbsp; We are committed to creating a diverse, supportive work environment where everyone is treated with respect. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunities and welcome individuals from all backgrounds to join us &amp; embrace the adventure! &nbsp;</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p>&nbsp;</p> <h3>About Scopely</h3> <p>Scopely is a leading video game and global interactive entertainment company, home to many of the world’s most beloved and enduring experiences, including two of the most successful mobile games of all-time “MONOPOLY GO!” and “Pokémon GO,” along with “Stumble Guys,” “Star Trek™ Fleet Command,” “MARVEL Strike Force,” “WWE Champions,” the Scrabble® franchise, “Yahtzee® With Buddies,” and many others. Across mobile, web, PC, and console, Scopely creates, develops, publishes, and live-operates one of the most diversified and award-winning portfolios in the games industry — bringing hundreds of millions of players together through a shared love of play.</p> <p>Founded in 2011, Scopely is powered by its exceptional team — including thousands of world-class gamemakers around the globe, a distinctive tenet-driven culture, and its proprietary technology platform, Playgami. Together, these strengths have fueled Scopely’s position as the #1 mobile games company in the U.S. and #2 globally, generating more than $10 billion in lifetime revenue. Whether building global sensations like “MONOPOLY GO!” from the ground up, or expanding through strategic acquisitions, including the FoxNext, GSN, and Niantic games businesses — Scopely consistently delivers experiences players love today and return to for years to come.</p> <p>Recognized multiple times as one of the "100 Most Influential Companies in the World" by TIME magazine and one of Fast Company's "World's Most Innovative Companies" and “Best Workplaces for Innovators,” Scopely believes that video games can be a force for good — creating meaningful connections, vibrant communities, and making life better through play.</p> <p>Scopely has global operations and partners across four continents in more than a dozen countries worldwide. For more information, visit: <a href="https://www.scopely.com/">https://www.scopely.com/</a>.&nbsp;</p> <p>Notice to Candidates: Scopely will never request payment or financial information during the application or hiring process. Please apply only through our official <a href="http://scopely.com">website</a> and verify that all Talent Partner communications come from an email address ending in @<a href="http://scopely.com">scopely.com</a>.</p> <p>Should you have any questions or encounter any fraudulent requests/emails/websites, please immediately contact recruiting@scopely.com. Our job applicant privacy policies are available here: <a href="https://www.scopely.com/en/job-applicant-privacy-notice-for-ca-residents">California Privacy Notice</a> and <a href="https://www.scopely.com/en/eea-and-uk-job-applicant-privacy-notice">EEA/UK Privacy Notice</a>.</p> <p>Employment at Scopely is based solely on a person's merit and qualifications. Scopely does not discriminate against any employee or applicant because of race, creed, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity/expression, national origin, disability, age, genetic information, veteran status, marital status, pregnancy or related condition (including breastfeeding), or any other basis protected by law. We also consider qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records, consistent with applicable federal, state and local law.</p></div>

title: Business Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Nex is on a mission to help families rediscover the joy of movement. Created by parents for parents, Nex combines technology and play to deliver fun, social, and interactive experiences powered by natural body motion, encouraging kids and adults to move more, play more, and have fun together. Nex Playground, the company’s award-winning active play system, is purpose-built to get families moving year-round, with safety and privacy as core considerations in its intentional design. It is certified kidSAFE+ COPPA compliant and built to support healthy, active play for all ages and abilities.</p> <p>Nex Playground features a growing library of 50+ experiences, including motion and dance games, fitness and educational experiences, and Nex Originals. Content includes collaborations with partners like Hasbro, Sesame Workshop, and NBCUniversal. Nex has been recognized by Fast Company’s Most Innovative Companies, TIME’s Best Inventions, and Parents’ Best Entertainment System for Families, and has earned Red Dot, IDEA, and Core77 international design awards. We encourage you to explore <a class="c-link" href="https://www.playthatmovesyou.com/p/have-fun" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://www.playthatmovesyou.com/p/have-fun" data-sk="tooltip_parent">Have Fun</a>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://www.playthatmovesyou.com/p/is-motion-gaming-back" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://www.playthatmovesyou.com/p/is-motion-gaming-back" data-sk="tooltip_parent">Is Motion Gaming Back?</a>, as they offer a deeper look into our culture, values, and explain how our approach to motion gaming differs from previous generations.</p> <p>To protect yourself from recruitment scams, please note that Nex communicates through official company emails ending in @nex.inc. If you receive a suspicious email or message, please do not respond and report it immediately to us.</p></div><p><strong>Location: </strong>Seattle, WA or Remote USA<br><strong>Annual Salary: </strong>$140,000 - $170,000 USD<br><strong>Type: </strong>Full-time<br><strong>Reports to: </strong>Director, Analytics</p> <h3><strong>About this Role</strong></h3> <p>Nex’s user base is growing quickly, and the amount of data we’re working with is growing even faster. We are seeking an experienced and dedicated Data Engineer to join our Analytics department and help us streamline, future-proof, and automate our reporting processes as well as our data backend as we move into the next phase of the company’s growth.</p> <p>The ideal candidate for this role loves problem solving and tinkering, and feels the thrill of accomplishment when a long-standing issue or project is resolved. Strong attention to detail and dedicated follow-through are key. If you want to work on a small team, for a growing company, laying down framework that will be used and appreciated by teams across multiple disciplines, we want to hear from you!</p> <h3><strong>Core Responsibilities</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Connect with cross-functional teams</strong>: The data environment we’re building will be used by members of the Accounting, Finance, Supply Chain, and Publishing teams, among others. Meet with them and get to know their needs so we can build things they’ll use for years.</li> <li><strong>Project Management</strong>: Keep track of &amp; prioritize short-term and long-term projects.</li> <li><strong>Build &amp; Support:</strong><span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span>Build new and improved ways for us to access &amp; view data, and see to their steady functioning over time.</li> <li><strong>Investigate &amp; Iterate:</strong><span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span>Keep an eye on how small improvements can be made to improve the cost and reliability of our data pipeline.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Required Qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li>3+ years of experience as a<span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span><strong>Data Engineer</strong><span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span>or 5+ years of experience as a<span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span><strong>Business Intelligence Engineer.</strong></li> <li>Experience with the AWS suite of tools and solutions to run a data environment end-to-end.</li> <li>Proven ability to work independently, without constant guidance.</li> <li>Comfortable working in ambiguous environments that require&nbsp;iteration &amp; investigation.</li> <li>Strong track record of working with&nbsp;<strong>cross-functional teams</strong>&nbsp;across disciplines such as marketing, product, engineering, and finance/accounting.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Preferred Qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Experience automating complex datasets, using SQL, Python, or another similar tool.</li> <li>Experience with building and maintaining APIs to connect data environments and pull raw data from various sources.</li> <li>Previous experience with data environments for digital gaming platforms or subscription services.</li> <li>Ability to thrive and create without the use of AI tools as a baseline.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>What Sets You Apart</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Creative solutions to complex problems</li> <li>Proactive approach to projects</li> <li>Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment</li> <li>Experience working with teams from different cultures and backgrounds</li> <li>You’re an expert on your own work &amp; can back up your results</li> <li>Good-natured and easy to work with</li> </ul> <p>#LI-Remote</p><div class="content-conclusion"><h3><strong class="bold-text-2">We Offer</strong></h3> <ul class="list-item-16"> <li class="list-item-16">Competitive compensation package.</li> <li class="list-item-23">Flexible working hours and vacation policy.</li> <li class="list-item-23">Product-driven culture that treasures talents and individual growth.</li> <li class="list-item-23">Front-row seat and hands-on experience with cutting edge technologies in the evolving gaming field</li> </ul> <p>Nex is located in&nbsp;<strong>San Jose, California, USA</strong>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<strong>Hong&nbsp;Kong</strong>. Learn more about us at&nbsp;<a href="https://www.nex.inc/who-we-are" target="">nex.inc/who-we-are</a>.<br><br>We encourage applications even if you don’t meet more than 50% of the requirements — we believe that experience comes in many forms!</p> <p data-start="274" data-end="661">Nex is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, gender identity, and sexual orientation), national origin, ancestry, age, physical or mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, marital status, military or veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. This policy applies to all individuals at every stage of the employment relationship, including all current and prospective employees, and covers all employment decisions including recruitment, hiring, job assignment, promotion, compensation, benefits, training, discipline and termination.</p> <p data-start="667" data-end="811">We are committed to providing a workplace free from discrimination and harassment and to fostering an inclusive environment for all employees.</p></div>

title: Senior Forward Deployed Engineer - Finance AI Enablement
full_description: <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Job Overview:</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Omada has a dedicated AI Transformation &amp; Enablement organization focused on embedding AI directly into how business functions operate. Rather than acting as a centralized innovation lab disconnected from day-to-day operations, this team deploys senior engineers directly into functions to partner with teams, understand their workflows, and build production AI systems that drive measurable business impact.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Finance is the next major deployment.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">As the Sr. Forward Deployed Engineer supporting Finance, you will operate as the embedded AI engineering partner for the Finance organization — attending planning reviews, close cycles, forecasting discussions, operational reviews, and executive preparation processes to deeply understand how Finance operates today and how AI can transform it tomorrow. This is a 0→1 build with a team behind you, focused on turning ambiguous, high-value finance problems into production systems used by executives and operators every day. You will own each agent end-to-end: from discovery and prototyping, to shipping, monitoring, and iterating.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You will partner closely with the Sr. Director, Strategic Finance, who owns the Finance AI roadmap and business prioritization, while remaining part of Omada’s AI Transformation &amp; Enablement engineering organization, where you will receive technical leadership, architecture guidance, peer collaboration, and engineering support from other Forward Deployed Engineers solving similar challenges across the company.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">This role is highly cross-functional and combines elements of AI engineering, systems integration, workflow automation, product thinking, business partnership, and organizational enablement. You will design, build, deploy, monitor, and continuously improve AI-powered systems that help Finance teams operate more efficiently, improve accuracy and consistency, accelerate decision-making, and scale institutional knowledge.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">The systems you build will operate within a highly regulated and compliance-sensitive environment that includes SOX, HIPAA, security, and data governance considerations. As part of the AI Transformation &amp; Enablement organization, you will help shape the standards, governance patterns, and operational practices that define responsible enterprise AI adoption at Omada.</span></p> <p><strong><span style="font-size: 10pt;">What You’ll Own:</span></strong></p> <p><strong><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Finance AI Integration &amp; Knowledge Layer</span></strong></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Design and build the Finance-specific AI integration layer that connects AI systems to enterprise finance platforms, operational data, and institutional knowledge sources.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">This includes:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Integrating AI systems with platforms such as NetSuite, Adaptive Planning, FloQast, AWS, and internal data warehouses</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Building retrieval and knowledge systems over financial documentation, board materials, KPI definitions, investor communications, and forecasting models</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Developing reusable AI workflow and orchestration patterns for Finance use cases</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Enabling conversational and natural-language interaction with operational and financial data</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Partnering with central Engineering and AI platform teams to adopt and extend shared AI infrastructure patterns</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You will design systems that allow Finance teams to progressively own configuration, evaluation, and operational management of AI workflows over time.</span></p> <p><strong><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AI-Powered Financial Quality &amp; Controls</span></strong></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Build AI-enabled quality assurance and validation systems that improve confidence, consistency, and operational rigor across Finance workflows.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Examples include:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Metric reconciliation across reporting materials and presentations</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Narrative and KPI consistency validation</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Financial calculation verification</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Reporting integrity and formatting validation</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AI-assisted review workflows with human-in-the-loop oversight</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Evaluation and auditability patterns supporting SOX-aligned processes where applicable</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You will help establish evaluation frameworks and review processes that ensure AI systems are reliable, measurable, and operationally trustworthy.</span></p> <p><strong><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Operational Intelligence &amp; Automation</span></strong></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Develop AI systems that continuously analyze operational and financial processes to surface insights, anomalies, optimization opportunities, and business risks.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Areas may include:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Cost and spend monitoring</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Vendor and procurement analysis</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Contract and compliance monitoring</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Pricing and operational trend analysis</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Cloud and AI platform cost optimization</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Automated summarization, alerting, and root-cause analysis</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You will focus on delivering practical AI solutions that improve operational efficiency and support faster, more informed decision-making.</span></p> <p><strong><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Market, Earnings &amp; Strategic Intelligence</span></strong></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Build AI-powered intelligence capabilities that help Finance leadership monitor external market activity and prepare executive-level materials more efficiently.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Examples include:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Monitoring competitor activity, earnings calls, filings, and analyst commentary</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Supporting benchmarking and market intelligence workflows</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Assisting with earnings preparation, executive Q&amp;A, and board preparation workflows</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Cross-referencing and validating data across financial narratives, trend reporting, and investor-facing materials</span></li> </ul> <p><strong>Financial Workflow &amp; Narrative Automation</strong></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Develop AI-enabled workflows that accelerate operational execution and reduce manual effort across recurring Finance processes.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Examples may include:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Monthly and quarterly reporting commentary</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Flash reports and KPI summaries</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Forecast and enrollment analysis</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Revenue and operational model validation</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Executive memo and board material drafting support</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You will partner closely with Finance SMEs to ensure workflows remain operationally accurate, transparent, and trusted.</span></p> <p><strong><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AI Evaluation, Enablement &amp; Adoption</span></strong></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Enable Finance teams to effectively evaluate, use, and extend AI systems over time.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">This includes:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Building evaluation frameworks, regression testing, and quality scorecards</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Establishing operational review and feedback loops</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Training Finance SMEs on AI evaluation and workflow management</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Promoting transparency around AI capabilities, limitations, and reliability</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Helping Finance teams grow long-term AI fluency and operational ownership</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Success in this role is not just measured by systems you build, but by how effectively the organization adopts and scales them.</span></p> <p><strong><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Cross-Functional Partnership &amp; Operating Model:</span></strong></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">This role operates with two closely connected partnership models by design.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">From a business perspective, you will be deeply embedded within the Finance organization and aligned to Finance priorities, workflows, operational rhythms, and strategic initiatives. The Sr. Director, Strategic Finance will own roadmap prioritization and business outcomes for Finance AI initiatives.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">From a technical perspective, you will remain part of Omada’s AI Transformation &amp; Enablement engineering organization, where you will collaborate with other Forward Deployed Engineers, participate in shared architectural standards, receive technical mentorship and code review, and contribute reusable patterns that scale across other functions.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You will regularly partner across:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Finance</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Accounting</span></li> <li 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Data &amp; Engineering</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Business Systems</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span and stakeholder alignment in a rapidly evolving AI landscape.</span></p> <p><strong><span style="font-size: 10pt;">What Makes This Role Different:</span></strong></p> <ul> <li style="font-size:
