title: Director, Data Engineering (AI Native)
full_description: <h3>About Life360</h3> <p>Life360’s mission is to keep people close to the ones they love. Our category-leading mobile app,Tile tracking devices, and Pet GPS tracker empower members to protect the people, pets, and things they care about most with a range of services, including location sharing, safe driver reports, and crash detection with emergency dispatch. Life360 serves approximately 97.8 million monthly active users (MAU), as of March 31, 2026, across more than 180 countries.&nbsp;</p> <p>Life360 delivers peace of mind and enhances everyday family life with seamless coordination for all the moments that matter, big and small. By continuing to innovate and deliver for our customers, we have become a household name and the must-have mobile-based membership for families (and those friends who are basically family).</p> <p>Life360 has more than 500 (and growing!) remote-first employees. For more information, please visit <a href="http://life360.com/">life360.com</a>.</p> <p><strong><em>Life360 is a Remote First company, which means a remote work environment will be the primary experience for all employees. All positions, unless otherwise specified, can be performed remotely (within the US and Canada) regardless of any specified location above.&nbsp;</em></strong></p> <h4>We are AI Native</h4> <p>We are building an AI native company where AI is an integral part of how we build and operate. AI tool usage during interviews varies by role. You may be asked to demonstrate proficiency with AI tools, discuss how you leverage AI, or complete interview exercises without AI assistance. Your Recruiter will provide clear guidance as you move through the interview process.</p> <p>Undisclosed use of AI not previously discussed with or approved by your Recruiter may impact your candidacy.</p> <h3>About The Team</h3> <p>The Data and Analytics (DnA) organization is the backbone of how Life360 understands its members, measures what matters, and makes better decisions. We own the data platform, analytics engineering, data science, and analytics functions that power insights for every operating group across the company. Our work ensures that every team at Life360 has reliable, well-modeled data and the tools to act on it. We’re a team that values clarity, directness, and building things that work.</p> <h3>About the Job</h3> <p>We’re looking for a Director of Data Engineering to lead the engineering half of our Data and Analytics organization. This is a senior leadership role where you’ll own the data from end to end; from the source to consumption by humans and LLMs. You will manage a strong team of data &amp; analytics engineers and managers and the strategic direction of our data, collaborating closely with leaders on data science, engineering, product analytics, and marketing analytics.</p> <p>This role requires someone who is technically credible across both data platform engineering and analytics engineering—not just one or the other. You need to be able to evaluate Databricks architecture decisions, understand how data flows through instrumentation SDKs and event collection pipelines, and challenge your managers' technical proposals on pipeline design just as readily as you can assess dbt project structure, data modeling standards, and semantic layer strategy. You won’t be writing code day-to-day, but you’ll need enough depth to set technical direction, spot when something is off, and earn the trust of strong engineers.</p> <p>Data engineering at Life360 is a strategic partner, not a service org. You’ll be embedded in product and business decisions—shaping roadmaps, pushing back when data needs aren’t accounted for, and designing systems for needs that haven’t been articulated yet. Your primary impact will come from how you lead people, align teams to business priorities, translate technical complexity into language the business can act on, and represent data engineering at the leadership table.</p> <p>We’re an AI native company, and we expect this leader to bring that mindset to data engineering. That means actively leveraging AI tools to accelerate development, exploring AI-powered approaches to data quality and pipeline optimization, and building infrastructure that supports ML and AI workloads alongside traditional analytics.</p> <p>For candidates based in the US, the salary range for this position is $216,000 to $318,000 USD. For candidates based out of Canada, the salary range for this position is $251,000 to $295,000 CAD. We take into consideration an individual's background and experience in determining final salary - therefore, base pay offered may vary considerably depending on geographic location, job-related knowledge, skills, and experience. The compensation package includes a wide range of medical, dental, vision, financial, and other benefits, as well as equity.</p> <h3>What You’ll Do</h3> <p><strong>Technical Strategy &amp; Execution</strong></p> <ul> <li>Define and drive the technical roadmap across data platform, analytics engineering, and ads data infrastructure. Set the architectural vision for how data is ingested, transformed, modeled, and served at Life360.</li> <li>Own the analytics engineering strategy end-to-end: dbt project structure, data modeling standards (dimensional, OBT, and semantic layer), testing and documentation practices, and the development workflow that analytics engineers use daily.</li> <li>Oversee the data platform: Databricks infrastructure, compute optimization, pipeline orchestration, data lake architecture, and the reliability/observability stack that keeps it all running at consumer scale.</li> <li>Drive toward a self-serve data experience where analysts and data scientists can answer their own questions without engineering bottlenecks—this is the outcome that ties platform and analytics engineering together.</li> <li>Make strategic build vs. buy decisions across the data stack and manage vendor relationships (Snowflake, Databricks, Amplitude, and related tooling).</li> <li>Drive data quality, governance, and documentation standards that make data trustworthy and self-service across the company.</li> <li>Bring an AI native approach to data engineering: leverage AI tools to accelerate development cycles, evaluate AI-powered data quality and anomaly detection solutions, and ensure our data infrastructure supports ML/AI workloads and experimentation at scale.</li> <li>Stay current on emerging technologies in the data and AI space and make pragmatic decisions about adoption—knowing when a new tool solves a real problem vs. when it’s a distraction.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Leadership &amp; People Management</strong></p> <ul> <li>Lead and develop three engineering managers and their teams, setting clear expectations, running effective org-level planning, and building a high-performance culture.</li> <li>Coach and grow your managers as leaders—not just executors. Invest in their ability to hire, develop talent, run retrospectives, and make tradeoffs independently.</li> <li>Own workforce planning, headcount allocation, and hiring strategy across all three teams. Run calibrations and drive promotion decisions.</li> <li>Build a cohesive engineering org from three distinct functional teams, establishing shared standards while respecting each team’s unique domain expertise.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Stakeholder &amp; Cross-Functional Partnership</strong></p> <ul> <li>Serve as the primary point of contact for data engineering across Product, Engineering, Finance, Marketing, and executive leadership. Translate business needs into engineering priorities and translate engineering constraints into language the business can act on.</li> <li>Manage intake and prioritization across multiple operating groups, balancing competing demands and making clear, defensible tradeoff decisions.</li> <li>Represent data engineering in company-level planning, roadmap reviews, and leadership forums. Be the person who can explain what’s possible, what’s expensive, and what’s worth doing.</li> <li>Build strong partnerships with Analytics and Data Science to ensure that platform investments and data models actually serve the analysts, decision scientists, data scientists, and business stakeholders downstream.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Business Impact</strong></p> <ul> <li>Understand Life360’s business deeply—MAU growth, retention mechanics, subscription economics, ads monetization—and use that understanding to prioritize engineering work that moves the needle.</li> <li>Partner with product and business teams to ensure data infrastructure supports experimentation, feature measurement, and decision-making at the speed the business requires.</li> <li>Own budget and cost management for data engineering infrastructure, ensuring efficient use of cloud resources and vendor spend.</li> </ul> <h3>What We’re Looking For</h3> <p><strong>Must-Haves</strong></p> <ul> <li>8–10+ years of experience in data engineering, analytics engineering, or data platform roles at technology companies, with at least 5 years in people management.</li> <li>3+ years managing managers; you know how to lead through others, set org-level direction, and scale teams.</li> <li>Define and drive the architectural vision for end-to-end ELT/ETL processes, covering data ingestion, transformation, modeling, and serving at consumer scale.</li> <li>Strong technical credibility across data platform and analytics engineering, combined with solid business acumen, consistently tying technical decisions to business impact.&nbsp;</li> <li>Strong experience with dbt (data build tool): project structure, testing frameworks, documentation standards, CI/CD for data transformations, and how to scale dbt across multiple teams and domains.</li> <li>Production experience with Databricks or equivalent lakehouse platforms (Snowflake, BigQuery) at consumer scale—including pipeline design, orchestration, reliability and compute optimization, cost management, and data lake architecture.</li> <li>Demonstrated experience managing multiple teams or workstreams simultaneously (15+ people across distinct functions) at a technology company.</li> <li>Strong track record of stakeholder management at the director/VP level—you’re comfortable saying no, explaining tradeoffs, and building trust with non-technical leaders.</li> <li>Ability to distill technical complexity into language that non-technical stakeholders can understand and act on. You can run a crisp stakeholder review with a VP of Product as effectively as you can lead an architecture review with your engineers.</li> <li>Proven ability to prioritize ruthlessly across competing demands from multiple business units—a skill sharpened by working in fast-paced tech environments.</li> <li>Strong business acumen—you understand how product metrics, growth loops, and monetization models connect to data infrastructure decisions.</li> <li>AI native mindset: you actively use AI tools in your own work and have a point of view on how AI changes data engineering practices, team productivity, and infrastructure requirements.</li> <li>Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Data Science, or a related field.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice-to-Haves</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience at a consumer mobile, subscription-based, or marketplace technology company.</li> <li>Hands-on experience with our specific stack: Databricks, Amplitude, Statsig, dbt.</li> <li>Experience building or managing ads data infrastructure or ad-tech data pipelines.</li> <li>Experience with real-time data streaming and event-driven architectures at scale.</li> <li>Track record of implementing AI/ML-powered approaches to data quality, pipeline optimization, or infrastructure automation.</li> <li>Experience managing remote-first or distributed engineering teams at tech companies.</li> </ul> <h3>Our Benefits</h3> <ul> <li>Competitive pay and benefits.</li> <li>Medical, dental, vision, life and disability insurance plans (100% paid for US employees). We offer supplemental plans for medical and dental for Canadian employees.</li> <li>401(k) plan with company matching program in the US and RRSP with DPSP plan for Canadian employees.</li> <li>Employee Assistance Program (EAP) for mental wellness.</li> <li>Flexible PTO and 12 company wide days off throughout the year.</li> <li>Learning &amp; Development programs.</li> <li>Equipment, tools, and reimbursement support for a productive remote environment.</li> <li>Free Life360 Platinum Membership for your preferred circle.</li> </ul> <h3>Life360 Values</h3> <p>Our company’s mission driven culture is guided by our shared values to create a trusted work environment where you can bring your authentic self to work and make a positive difference&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Be a Good Person - We have a team of high integrity people you can trust.&nbsp;</li> <li>Be Direct With Respect - We communicate directly, even when it’s hard.</li> <li>Members Before Metrics - We focus on building an exceptional experience for families.&nbsp;</li> <li>High Intensity High Impact - We do whatever it takes to get the job done.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h3>Our Commitment to Diversity</h3> <p>We believe that different ideas, perspectives and backgrounds create a stronger and more creative work environment that delivers better results. Together, we continue to build an inclusive culture that encourages, supports, and celebrates the diverse voices of our employees. It fuels our innovation and connects us closer to our customers and the communities we serve. We strive to create a workplace that reflects the communities we serve and where everyone feels empowered to bring their authentic best selves to work.</p> <p><em>We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at Life360. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability status or any legally protected status.&nbsp;&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>We encourage people of all backgrounds to apply. We believe that a diversity of perspectives and experiences create a foundation for the best ideas. Come join us in building something meaningful.</em><strong><em> </em></strong><em>Even if you don’t meet 100% of the below qualifications, you should still seriously consider applying!</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>#LI-Remote</strong></p> <p><em>____________________________________________________________________________</em></p> <p><br><br></p>

title: Senior Staff Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong><u>About Integrated Specialty Coverages</u></strong></p> <p>Integrated Specialty Coverages, LLC (ISC) is a growth stage technology and data-driven commercial MGA and insurance wholesaler leading innovation in the market.&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <p>Backed by one of the leading private equity firms, Onex Partners, and led by a forward-thinking management team, ISC is combining the worlds of insurance and technology to create an Insurtech powerhouse. As a leading online distributor of insurance products for a range of industries and “Main Street USA”, we are looking for the right people to help us in our mission of achieving exponential growth. We strive to be the number one place to go for brokers and agents to source insurance. To accomplish this, we’re building a digitally focused team that deeply understands the intersection between user experience, data, and AI/ML to optimize the way we engage with our customers and partners.</p></div><p><strong>Job Summary</strong></p> <p>The&nbsp;Senior Staff Data Engineer is the technical owner of ISC’s data platform, responsible for defining architecture, driving technical decisions, and delivering solutions that align with business objectives. This role serves as the primary technical authority across the data engineering team and will lead architecture discussions, mentor engineers, and set engineering standards. You will partner directly with engineering, product, data science, and business stakeholders to translate complex business needs into scalable technical solutions. You must navigate ambiguity, scope undefined problems, and drive them to completion independently. A strong emphasis on AI, both integrated in the development workflow and user-facing capabilities, is expected with a commitment to upskilling the team in modern tooling and practices. No prior insurance knowledge is required, but you must quickly develop deep domain expertise.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Position Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li>Own the technical architecture and long-term strategy of ISC’s data platform, making technology decisions that balance scalability, maintainability, and business value.</li> <li>Drive adoption of AI-assisted development practices and build AI-driven capabilities that create measurable business value</li> <li>Partner with executive, product, engineering, and business stakeholders to translate complex business needs into technical strategy and delivery plans</li> <li>Provide hands-on technical mentorship to data engineers through code reviews, architecture discussions, and knowledge sharing</li> <li>Navigate ambiguous, undefined problems by scoping them independently and delivering solutions aligned with business priorities</li> <li>Design, build, and maintain data infrastructure for extraction, transformation, and loading from a wide variety of sources using AWS, DBT + SQL on Snowflake, Python, Docker, and Airflow.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Minimum Qualifications</strong></p> <ul> <li>7+ years of data engineering experience from requirements through production and maintenance</li> <li>Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science or related degree or equivalent experience</li> <li>Strong experience building, optimizing and debugging data models, pipelines and data warehousing using SQL, DBT and Snowflake</li> <li>7+ years of experience writing production software in a cloud-native environment using Python and AWS services (S3, Batch, ECR, DMS, MWAA)</li> <li>Experience integrating AI/ML tools into development workflows or building AI-driven data products</li> <li>Demonstrated experience as a technical authority by driving architecture decisions, setting engineering standards, and mentoring engineers</li> <li>A successful history of transforming, processing and extracting value from large disconnected, datasets from a variety of data sources (Flat files, Excel, databases, APIs, etc.)</li> <li>Experience working in a complex, fast-moving environment as part of a small, collaborative team</li> </ul> <p><strong>Preferred Qualifications</strong></p> <ul> <li>Insurance industry systems and technology experience</li> <li>Experience building AI/ML pipelines or leading AI adoption initiatives across engineering teams</li> <li>Prior experience working in a staff or principal engineer role or equivalent technical leadership position</li> <li>Experience operating in a high-growth or PE-backed environment with competing priorities and fast timelines</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>This role also offers bonus pay. Your ISC Talent Acquisition representative will share more details about the bonus component should you advance in the interview process.</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>The starting annual pay scale for this position is listed below. Actual starting pay will be based on factors such as skills, qualifications, training, and experience. In addition, the company offers comprehensive benefits including medical, dental and vision insurance, 401(k) plan with match, paid time off, and other benefits.</p> <p>ISC's salary ranges are determined by role and level. The range displayed on each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position across all US locations and could be higher or lower based on a multitude of factors, including job-related skills, experience, and relevant education or training.</p></div><div class="title">National Pay Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$127,036</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$158,795 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong><u>Benefits of Working at ISC</u></strong></p> <ul> <li>Employee Ownership Program - every eligible employee shares in the financial rewards that grow when the company grows</li> <li>Professional development opportunities</li> <li>Owner Referral Program</li> <li>Work from home reimbursement for remote/hybrid roles</li> <li>Canary emergency financial assistance program</li> <li>Comprehensive medical, dental, vision</li> <li>Life/AD&amp;D Insurance</li> <li>Confidential, Employee Assistance Program</li> <li>Health Savings Account, includes company contribution</li> <li>Short-term disability</li> <li>Voluntary benefits - supplemental accident, critical illness, hospital insurance</li> <li>Employee discounts</li> <li>401(k) Plan with company match contribution</li> <li>Addition Wealth Financial Wellness Program</li> <li>Various Time Off Programs</li> <li>11 company paid holidays</li> </ul> <p><em>Applicants may contact the ISC HR department via e-mail or phone to request and arrange for an accommodation that will allow the applicant to successfully complete the application process. Applicants needing assistance may request accommodation at any time. Please contact ISC at </em><a href="mailto:HR@ISCMGA.com">HR@ISCMGA.com</a><em> or 760-599-7242.</em></p> <p><em>ISC believes in creating long-term relationships by being responsive and relevant and by consistently delivering value to our community of customers. Specifically, we focus on attracting, developing, and retaining the best talent for our business, challenging our people, demonstrating a “can-do” attitude, and fostering a collaborative and mutually supportive environment. </em></p> <p><em>Diversity creates a healthier atmosphere: All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, marital status, medical condition, genetic information, mental or physical disability, military or veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by local, state, or Federal law.</em></p> <p><em>&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>**Must be legally authorized to work in the United States.**</em></p> <p><em>**ISC participates in the Federal E-Verify program**</em></p></div>

title: Lead Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About Karbon</strong></p> <p style="text-align: left;">Karbon is the global leader in AI-powered practice management software for accounting firms. We provide an award-winning cloud platform that helps tens of thousands of accounting professionals work more efficiently and collaboratively every day. With customers in 40 countries, we have grown into a globally distributed team across the US, Australia, New Zealand, Canada, the United Kingdom, and the Philippines. We are well-funded, ranked #1 on G2, growing rapidly, and have a people-first culture that is recognized with Great Place To Work® certification and on Fortune magazine's Best Small Workplaces™ List.</p></div><h2>About the Role</h2> <p>Karbon is transforming how modern businesses manage financial and operational data. As Lead Data Engineer, you are the technical owner of our data platform — the person who sets direction, drives architecture, and is ultimately accountable for what the team builds and ships.</p> <p>You'll define how we design, build, and evolve a platform that powers AI-driven insights, real-time analytics, and next-generation data experiences for thousands of customers and millions of transactions. You'll be the primary technical voice in cross-functional conversations with analytics, BI, AI, and product teams — and the person who makes sure your team has the clarity, quality bar, and unblocking they need to deliver.</p> <h2>What You'll Own</h2> <ul> <li><strong>Platform strategy and architecture</strong> — own the end-to-end design of our data platform: medallion architecture, data contracts, lineage, multi-tenancy, and the technical roadmap that keeps us ahead of scale.</li> <li><strong>Cross-functional technical leadership</strong> — be the primary data engineering partner for analytics, BI, AI/ML, and product teams; lead design reviews, drive alignment on data contracts, and represent the platform in broader engineering conversations.</li> <li><strong>Solution design</strong> — run architecture and design for all significant platform initiatives: pipeline infrastructure, semantic layers, graph database integration, streaming, and AI/ML feature engineering.</li> <li><strong>Security and governance ownership</strong> — accountable for the platform's security model end-to-end: RBAC, row-level security, PII handling, data residency, tenant isolation, and compliance with privacy regulations.</li> <li><strong>Engineering quality and standards</strong> — set and enforce the bar for how the team builds: testing frameworks, CI/CD for data transformations, observability, code review, and documentation.</li> <li><strong>Team enablement</strong> — mentor and unblock senior and junior engineers; identify gaps in capability or process before they become delivery risks; ensure the team can consistently produce high-quality work.</li> <li><strong>Operational excellence</strong> — own platform reliability: monitoring, alerting, incident response playbooks, and cost optimisation as data volume scales.</li> </ul> <h2>What Sets You Apart</h2> <p><strong>Required</strong></p> <ul> <li>10+ years as a data engineer, with demonstrated experience in a lead, staff, or principal-level role.</li> <li>Deep expertise with cloud data platforms, Databricks strongly preferred.</li> <li>Proven track record designing and owning large-scale, multi-tenant data architectures — not just contributing to them.</li> <li>Strong command of ELT/ETL tooling (Fivetran, Airbyte, or similar), transformation frameworks (dbt), and dimensional modeling at scale.</li> <li>Experience driving technical direction across teams: leading design reviews, influencing architectural decisions, and communicating trade-offs clearly to technical and non-technical stakeholders.</li> <li>Experience implementing enterprise-grade security and governance: RBAC, RLS, PII masking, data residency, and privacy regulation compliance (GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA).</li> <li>Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform or equivalent) and CI/CD ownership for data systems.</li> <li>You've mentored engineers, raised team capability, and unblocked delivery — not just individually shipped.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Highly Valued</strong></p> <ul> <li>Graph databases (Neo4j, Amazon Neptune, ArangoDB) and graph query patterns.</li> <li>Real-time/streaming data (Kafka, Spark Streaming, Fivetran CDC).</li> <li>ML infrastructure, feature stores, or MLOps tooling.</li> <li>Experience shaping data platform strategy in a scaling SaaS environment.</li> </ul> <h2>Our Core Data Stack</h2> <ul> <li><strong>Platform:</strong> Databricks (core compute and transformation layer)&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>Ingestion:</strong> Fivetran and custom pipelines&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>Transformation:</strong> DLT/ dbt with medallion architecture&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>Cloud:</strong> Microsoft Azure&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>Graph:</strong> Neo4j / ArangoDB (evolving)&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>Observability:</strong> Datadog</li> <li><strong>IaC:</strong> Terraform</li> </ul> <p>Our architecture continues to evolve toward real-time streaming, graph intelligence, and AI-native data experiences. If you care about platform ownership, engineering excellence, and building a team that ships with confidence — you'll feel right at home here.</p> <h4><strong>Why Work at Karbon?</strong></h4> <ul> <li>Gain global experience across the USA, Australia, New Zealand, UK, Canada and the Philippines</li> <li>4 weeks annual leave plus 5 extra "Karbon Days" off a year</li> <li>Flexible working environment</li> <li>Work with (and learn from) an experienced, high-performing team</li> <li>Be part of a fast-growing company that firmly believes in promoting high performers from within</li> <li>A collaborative, team-oriented culture that embraces diversity, invests in development, and provides consistent feedback</li> <li>Generous parental leave</li> </ul> <h2>Our Engineering Standards</h2> <p><strong>Balance Speed and Quality</strong> Engineers are expected to balance delivery speed with a strong commitment to quality, meeting agreed timelines while producing reliable, maintainable, and well-tested solutions. Sound judgment in making trade-offs between velocity and long-term sustainability is essential.</p> <p><strong>Collaborate Effectively</strong> Engineering is collaborative by default. Team members are expected to contribute constructively in design discussions, reviews, and planning, communicate clearly about progress and risks, and support shared team outcomes in both hybrid and distributed environments.</p> <p><strong>Build and Maintain Systems</strong> Engineers are responsible for building new capabilities while maintaining and improving existing systems. This includes designing scalable solutions, reducing technical debt, supporting operational stability, and contributing to continuous improvement.</p> <p><strong>Operate with Autonomy</strong> A high degree of autonomy is expected. Given clear objectives, engineers should independently translate problems into actionable technical approaches, proactively identify improvements, and continuously expand relevant technical expertise.</p> <p><strong>Ownership and Accountability</strong> Ownership is fundamental. Engineers are accountable for the quality, performance, and customer impact of their work from design through post-release support, and are expected to follow through on commitments.</p> <p><strong>AI-Enabled Engineering</strong> AI is reshaping how software is built, and we are committed to leveraging it as a force multiplier for creativity, impact, and capability. Engineers are expected to confidently apply strong technical fundamentals while embracing AI tools and approaches to enhance productivity, problem-solving, and innovation.</p> <p><strong>Contribute to Team Culture</strong> Engineers contribute positively to a culture of professionalism, transparency, low bureaucracy, and mutual respect, strengthening team performance through authenticity, curiosity, and collaboration.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p data-type="unstyled" data-id="37024650-610f-4dfe-8f74-6e5b0feb927b"><strong>Please be aware that Karbon will only contact you via email from our domain, karbonhq.com. If you receive an email from any other domain, please do not click any of those links.</strong></p> <p data-type="unstyled" data-id="37024650-610f-4dfe-8f74-6e5b0feb927b">Karbon embraces diversity and inclusion, aligning with our values as a business. Research has shown that women and underrepresented groups are less likely to apply to jobs unless they meet every single criteria. If you've made it this far in the job description but your past experience doesn't perfectly align, we do encourage you to still apply. You could still be the right person for the role!</p> <p data-type="unstyled" data-id="5f9e3aa2-2690-4788-af20-892dbdba6ed2">We recruit and reward people based on capability and performance. We don’t discriminate based on race, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, lifestyle, age, educational background, national origin, religion, physical or cognitive ability, and other diversity dimensions that may hinder inclusion in the organization.</p> <p data-type="unstyled" data-id="bb4a5afa-071e-49bd-9510-b951e1f125de">Generally, if you are a good person, we want to talk to you. <span data-type="EMOJI" data-emoji-colon="stuck_out_tongue" data-emoji-id="😛" data-id="97488c7e-05ea-4a57-8774-fd75a6a1882c">😛</span></p> <p data-type="unstyled" data-id="a6b8c301-2390-453b-a5eb-e526a94dca3c">If there are any adjustments or accommodations that we can make to assist you during the recruitment process, and your journey at Karbon, contact us at people.support@karbonhq.com for a confidential discussion.</p> <p data-type="unstyled" data-id="a6b8c301-2390-453b-a5eb-e526a94dca3c">&nbsp;</p> <p style="text-align: center;" data-type="unstyled" data-id="a6b8c301-2390-453b-a5eb-e526a94dca3c"><em><strong><span style="color: rgb(42, 46, 69); font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: normal; text-align: start; word-spacing: 0px; white-space: pre-wrap; float: none; display: inline !important;">At this time, we request that agency referrals are not submitted for this position. We appreciate your understanding and encourage direct applications from interested candidates. Thank you!</span></strong></em></p></div>

title: Forward Deployed Researcher
full_description: <h1 style="text-align: center;">Forward Deployed Researcher</h1> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">&nbsp; </span><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>&nbsp;&nbsp;Prolific</em></span></p> <p style="text-align: left;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Prolific is not just another player in the AI space – we are the architects of the human data infrastructure that's reshaping the landscape of AI development. In a world where foundational AI technologies are increasingly commoditized, it's the quality and diversity of human-generated data that truly differentiates products and models.</span><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>&nbsp;&nbsp;</em></span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><em>The Role</em></p> <p>Prolific AI Research (PAIR) is the AI research group at Prolific (<a href="https://labs.prolific.com/">https://labs.prolific.com/</a>).&nbsp; We're seeking a Forward Deployed Researcher to serve as Prolific's technical research partner to AI labs and enterprise customers. You'll work directly with customers on AI evaluation and data collection projects - advising on methodology, designing frameworks, and delivering research engagements end-to-end as part of our services team. You'll contribute to how organizations approach evaluation, alignment, and human data challenges while shaping Prolific's own capabilities. Your work will directly impact how we understand, evaluate, and improve AI systems through high-quality human data.</p> <p style="text-align: center;"><em>&nbsp;</em></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141);">What You’ll Be Doing</span></p> <p><strong>Customer Projects</strong></p> <ul> <li>Serve as Prolific's technical research partner on customer engagements with AI labs and enterprise AI teams</li> <li>Advise and prototype bespoke solutions like evaluation methodology, rubric design, data collection approaches, quality frameworks, verifiers and validation frameworks, as well as RL environments</li> <li>Own methodology for projects - from scoping through delivery - working alongside our services team</li> <li>Build trusted relationships with customer research and engineering teams</li> </ul> <p><strong>Internal Partnership</strong></p> <ul> <li>Surface patterns from customer work that should become platform capabilities, partnering with Product and Engineering to shape roadmap priorities</li> <li>Work with Services and Account teams to qualify opportunities and shape proposals</li> <li>Share learnings across the Research Engineering function to strengthen our collective expertise</li> <li>Contribute to Prolific's research publications and external collaborations as opportunities arise</li> </ul> <p><strong>Cross-Functional Collaboration</strong></p> <ul> <li>Collaborate with product teams to translate research insights into practical applications</li> <li>Mentor team members on advanced AI concepts and emerging research</li> <li>Communicate complex technical concepts to diverse stakeholders</li> </ul> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141);"><em>What You’ll Bring&nbsp;</em></span></p> <ul> <li>3+ years of experience in AI/ML research, research engineering, or applied ML</li> <li>Strong knowledge of LLM evaluation methodologies, data collection design, and human feedback approaches</li> <li>Experience designing AI-assisted or model-in-the-loop workflows - you think creatively about where AI can augment human judgment</li> <li>Track record of executing research or applied AI/ML projects with clear outcomes</li> <li>Can build quickly when needed - you're comfortable prototyping solutions and build your own tooling</li> <li>Strong communicator across contexts - you can hold your own with AI lab researchers, translate methodology into actionable recommendations for customers, and bring internal teams along on what matters and why. Prior customer-facing or consulting experience is a plus but not required.</li> <li>Based in US, Canada, or Mexico (or able to work US timezone hours)</li> </ul> <p style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;</p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>&nbsp; Why Prolific is a great place to work</em></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">We've built a unique platform that connects researchers and companies with a global pool of participants, enabling the collection of high-quality, ethically sourced human behavioral data and feedback. This data is the cornerstone of developing more accurate, nuanced, and aligned AI systems.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">We believe that the next leap in AI capabilities won't come solely from scaling existing models but from integrating diverse human perspectives and behaviors into AI development. By providing this crucial human data infrastructure, Prolific is positioning itself at the forefront of the next wave of AI innovation—one that reflects the breadth and the best of humanity.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Working for us will place you at the forefront of AI innovation, providing access to our unique human data platform and opportunities for groundbreaking research. Join us to enjoy a competitive salary, benefits, and remote working within our impactful, mission-driven culture.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Join us to enjoy a competitive salary, benefits, and remote working within our impactful, mission-driven culture. At Prolific, our compensation packages for eligible roles include base salary, equity, and benefits. Many roles also include the opportunity to earn a cash variable element, such as a bonus or commission. Each job posting shows a salary range that reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hires, based on the role’s location as well as your skills, experience, and relevant education or training. You can check the job posting’s subtitle to see where the position is based. Your recruiter will also be happy to share the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process.</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;</p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>Links to more information on Prolific</em></span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.notion.so/prolific/dbc97f2b3ff24f1bb6fa834a2c9c3283?v=4f874e88e46a4f54afd8bf62f1db19ed&amp;p=9f2c1de05dfa43338d48c20362bfead1&amp;pm=c">Benefits&nbsp;</a></span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.notion.so/prolific/dbc97f2b3ff24f1bb6fa834a2c9c3283?v=4f874e88e46a4f54afd8bf62f1db19ed">External Handbook</a>&nbsp;</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.prolific.com/">Website&nbsp;</a></span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.youtube.com/@JoinProlific">Youtube</a>&nbsp;</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;</p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>Privacy Statement</em></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">By submitting your application, you agree that Prolific may collect your personal data for recruiting and global organisation planning. Prolific's&nbsp;<a href="https://www.notion.so/prolific/Policy-Privacy-Notice-for-Candidates-f94a136a67544388b4888bc436451b57">Candidate Privacy Notice</a> explains what personal information Prolific may process, where Prolific may process your personal information, its purposes for processing your personal information, and the rights you can exercise over Prolific use of your personal information.</span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p>

title: Senior Analytics Engineer
full_description: <h2 style="text-align: center;">Senior Analytics Engineer</h2> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Data</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>&nbsp;<span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141);">&nbsp;Prolific</span></em></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Prolific is not just another player in the AI space—we are the architects of the human data infrastructure that's reshaping the landscape of AI development. In a world where foundational AI technologies are increasingly commoditized, it's the quality and diversity of human-generated data that truly differentiates products and models.</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>The role</em></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">As an Analytics Engineer in the Data Infrastructure Team at Prolific, you'll be at the forefront of transforming and maintaining Prolific's data infrastructure. SQL: Deep experience with dbt and SQL to design, build, and maintain scalable data models.</span></li> <li style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Cloud Technology Knowledge: Strong familiarity with cloud platforms like AWS, GCP etc</span></li> <li style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Data Accuracy Focus: Passion for ensuring high data quality through tests/assertions and robust documentation.</span></li> <li style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Commercial Acumen: Ability to understand business needs and communicate effectively with non-technical stakeholders.</span></li> <li style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Mentorship Ability: Advocate for best practices in logging and data modeling that supports robust and effective analysis, reporting , and experimentation.</span></li> <li style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Collaboration: Skilled at working cross-functionally and translating complex technical concepts into actionable insights for the business.</span></li> <li style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Process-Driven: Proficiency in designing repeatable and scalable workflows for data transformation.</span></li> </ul> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>What you’ll be doing in the role&nbsp;</em></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Building Data Models: Create complex dbt models, custom macros, and reusable packages. Optimise transformations and implement robust testing strategies to ensure data integrity and model performance.</span></li> <li style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Ownership: Monitoring and maintaining dbt workflow jobs, ensuring smooth data refreshes and up-to-date pipelines.You will also be responsible for data models for BI analytics &amp; company level reporting&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Ensuring Data Accuracy: Writing tests and assertions to validate data integrity and consistency across models.&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Documenting and Standardizing: Creating and maintaining thorough documentation of dbt processes to ensure best practices within the BI team.</span></li> <li style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Translating Complex Data Concepts: Acting as a key communicator, translating technical data issues into understandable business terms for stakeholders.</span></li> <li style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Mentoring Team Members: Supporting junior analysts and data engineers, especially in setting up experimentation platforms and data best practices.</span></li> <li style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Collaborating Across Teams: Working closely with the product, engineering, and BI teams to ensure data infrastructure supports evolving business needs.</span></li> </ul> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); This data is the cornerstone of developing more accurate, nuanced, and aligned AI systems.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">We believe that the next leap in AI capabilities won't come solely from scaling existing models, but from integrating diverse human perspectives and behaviors into AI development. By providing this crucial human data infrastructure, Prolific is positioning itself at the forefront of the next wave of AI innovation – one that reflects the breadth and the best of humanity.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Working for us will place you at the forefront of AI innovation, providing access to our unique human data platform and opportunities for groundbreaking research. Join us to enjoy a competitive salary, benefits, and remote working within our impactful, mission-driven culture.</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>Links to more information on Prolific</em></span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.notion.so/prolific/dbc97f2b3ff24f1bb6fa834a2c9c3283?v=4f874e88e46a4f54afd8bf62f1db19ed&amp;p=9f2c1de05dfa43338d48c20362bfead1&amp;pm=c">Benefits&nbsp;</a></span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.notion.so/prolific/dbc97f2b3ff24f1bb6fa834a2c9c3283?v=4f874e88e46a4f54afd8bf62f1db19ed">External Handbook</a>&nbsp;</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.prolific.com/">Website&nbsp;</a></span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.youtube.com/@JoinProlific">Youtube</a>&nbsp;</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>Privacy Statement</em></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">By submitting your application, you agree that Prolific may collect your personal data for recruiting and global organisation planning. title: Senior Data Engineer
full_description: <h2 style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Senior Data Engineer&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;&nbsp;</span></h2> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>Prolific</em></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Prolific is not just another player in the AI space – we are the architects of the human data infrastructure that's reshaping the landscape of AI development. In a world where foundational AI technologies are increasingly commoditized, it's the quality and diversity of human-generated data that truly differentiates products and models.</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>The role</em></span></p> <p>We're looking for a Senior Data Engineer to help build scalable data solutions that serve teams across the business – from data scientists and analysts to AI engineers and product teams. You'll contribute to both the underlying platform and the way data is used in our products, working in a modern, cloud native environment where privacy, security, and good data practices are part of how we build.</p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>What you’ll bring to the role</em></span></p> <ul> <li><strong>Technical Expertise:</strong> 3+ years building and shipping production grade data systems, with strong SQL skills and proficiency in Python or another object-oriented language (Java, Scala etc.)</li> <li><strong>Familiarity with cloud-native infrastructure</strong> - ideally some exposure to Terraform, Kubernetes, or similar IaC and container orchestration tools. We don't expect deep expertise in all of these, but comfort working in this kind of environment matters.</li> <li><strong>Experience designing data APIs or services</strong> that expose data to applications, or a strong interest in working across the analytical/operational boundary.</li> <li><strong>A thoughtful approach to data quality, privacy, and security</strong> - you understand that how data is used is as important as how it's moved.</li> <li><strong>Strong collaboration skills</strong> and comfort working across teams with different priorities — engineers, data scientists, AI engineers, product.</li> <li><strong>A pragmatic, curious mindset</strong> - you enjoy keeping up with the field and know when to reach for a new tool versus when to stick with what works.</li> <li><strong>Pipeline Management:</strong> Hands on experience with data pipeline tools (Airflow, dbt) and strong ability to optimise for performance and reliability.</li> <li><strong>Quality Focus:</strong> Commitment to continuously improving product quality, security, and performance through rigorous testing and code reviews.</li> <li><strong>Documentation:</strong> Meticulous approach to creating and maintaining architecture and systems documentation.</li> <li><strong>Problem-Solving:</strong> Exceptional analytical skills to troubleshoot complex data issues and implement effective solutions.</li> <li><strong>Independence: </strong>Capability to ship medium features independently while contributing to the team's overall objectives.</li> </ul> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141);">What you’ll be doing in the role</span>&nbsp;</em></span></p> <ul> <li>Build and maintain data pipelines that power analytics, ML workloads, and product-facing applications - from internal databases, SaaS sources, and streaming systems through to the teams and services that consume them.</li> <li>Evolve our data platform alongside cloud platform engineers, using infrastructure-as-code (Terraform) and Kubernetes-based deployments (Argo) to keep the platform scalable, reliable, and self-serve.</li> <li>System Architecture: Design and implement scalable data infrastructure that accommodates our growing data volume and complexity.</li> <li>Develop data services and APIs that expose trusted data to product applications, bridging analytical and operational systems.</li> <li>Own data quality and observability, putting monitoring, testing, and alerting in place so issues are caught early and trust in the data stays high.</li> <li>Partner with AI engineers, data scientists, analysts, and product teams to understand their data needs and design the right solutions – not just the quickest ones.</li> <li>Uphold strong data privacy, security, and compliance practices in everything you build, particularly where data flows into product-facing contexts.</li> <li>Technical Documentation: Create and maintain comprehensive documentation of data flows, models, and systems for knowledge sharing.</li> <li>Security and Compliance: Ensure all data systems adhere to security best practices and compliance requirements.</li> </ul> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>Why Prolific is a great place to work</em></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">We've built a unique platform that connects researchers and companies with a global pool of participants, enabling the collection of high-quality, ethically sourced human behavioral data and feedback. This data is the cornerstone of developing more accurate, nuanced, and aligned AI systems.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">We believe that the next leap in AI capabilities won't come solely from scaling existing models, but from integrating diverse human perspectives and behaviors into AI development. By providing this crucial human data infrastructure, Prolific is positioning itself at the forefront of the next wave of AI innovation – one that reflects the breath and the best of humanity.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Working for us will place you at the forefront of AI innovation, providing access to our unique human data platform and opportunities for groundbreaking research. Join us to enjoy a competitive salary, benefits, and remote working within our impactful, mission-driven culture.</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>Links to more information on Prolific</em></span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.notion.so/prolific/dbc97f2b3ff24f1bb6fa834a2c9c3283?v=4f874e88e46a4f54afd8bf62f1db19ed&amp;p=9f2c1de05dfa43338d48c20362bfead1&amp;pm=c">Benefits&nbsp;</a></span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.notion.so/prolific/dbc97f2b3ff24f1bb6fa834a2c9c3283?v=4f874e88e46a4f54afd8bf62f1db19ed">External Handbook</a>&nbsp;</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.prolific.com/">Website&nbsp;</a></span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.youtube.com/@JoinProlific">Youtube</a>&nbsp;</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>Privacy Statement</em></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">By submitting your application, you agree that Prolific may collect your personal data for recruiting and global organisation planning. title: Senior Data Engineer (6 Month Contract)
full_description: <h2 style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Senior Data Engineer (6 Month Contract)</span></h2> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>Prolific</em></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Prolific is not just another player in the AI space – we are the architects of the human data infrastructure that's reshaping the landscape of AI development. In a world where foundational AI technologies are increasingly commoditized, it's the quality and diversity of human-generated data that truly differentiates products and models.</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>The role</em></span></p> <p>We're looking for a Senior Data Engineer to help build scalable data solutions that serve teams across the business – from data scientists and analysts to AI engineers and product teams. You'll contribute to both the underlying platform and the way data is used in our products, working in a modern, cloud native environment where privacy, security, and good data practices are part of how we build.</p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>What you’ll bring to the role</em></span></p> <ul> <li>Technical Expertise: 3+ years building and shipping production grade data systems, with strong SQL skills and proficiency in Python or another object-oriented language (Java, Scala etc.)</li> <li>Familiarity with cloud-native infrastructure - ideally some exposure to Terraform, Kubernetes, or similar IaC and container orchestration tools. We don't expect deep expertise in all of these, but comfort working in this kind of environment matters.</li> <li>Experience designing data APIs or services that expose data to applications, or a strong interest in working across the analytical/operational boundary.</li> <li>A thoughtful approach to data quality, privacy, and security - you understand that how data is used is as important as how it's moved.</li> <li>Strong collaboration skills and comfort working across teams with different priorities — engineers, data scientists, AI engineers, product.</li> <li>A pragmatic, curious mindset - you enjoy keeping up with the field and know when to reach for a new tool versus when to stick with what works.</li> <li>Pipeline Management: Hands on experience with data pipeline tools (Airflow, dbt) and strong ability to optimise for performance and reliability.</li> <li>Quality Focus: Commitment to continuously improving product quality, security, and performance through rigorous testing and code reviews.</li> <li>Documentation: Meticulous approach to creating and maintaining architecture and systems documentation.</li> <li>Collaborative Mindset: Ability to work across teams to understand and address diverse data needs while maintaining data integrity.</li> <li>Growth Orientation: Desire to continually keep up with advancements in data engineering practices and technologies.</li> <li>Problem-Solving: Exceptional analytical skills to troubleshoot complex data issues and implement effective solutions.</li> <li>Independence: Capability to ship medium features independently while contributing to the team's overall objectives.</li> </ul> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141);">What you’ll be doing in the role</span>&nbsp;</em></span></p> <ul> <li>Build and maintain data pipelines that power analytics, ML workloads, and product-facing applications - from internal databases, SaaS sources, and streaming systems through to the teams and services that consume them.</li> <li>Evolve our data platform alongside cloud platform engineers, using infrastructure-as-code (Terraform) and Kubernetes-based deployments (Argo) to keep the platform scalable, reliable, and self-serve.</li> <li>System Architecture: Design and implement scalable data infrastructure that accommodates our growing data volume and complexity.</li> <li>Develop data services and APIs that expose trusted data to product applications, bridging analytical and operational systems.</li> <li>Own data quality and observability, putting monitoring, testing, and alerting in place so issues are caught early and trust in the data stays high.</li> <li>Partner with AI engineers, data scientists, analysts, and product teams to understand their data needs and design the right solutions – not just the quickest ones.</li> <li>Uphold strong data privacy, security, and compliance practices in everything you build, particularly where data flows into product-facing contexts.</li> <li>Technical Documentation: Create and maintain comprehensive documentation of data flows, models, and systems for knowledge sharing.</li> <li>Security and Compliance: Ensure all data systems adhere to security best practices and compliance requirements.</li> </ul> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>Why Prolific is a great place to work</em></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">We've built a unique platform that connects researchers and companies with a global pool of participants, enabling the collection of high-quality, ethically sourced human behavioral data and feedback. This data is the cornerstone of developing more accurate, nuanced, and aligned AI systems.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">We believe that the next leap in AI capabilities won't come solely from scaling existing models, but from integrating diverse human perspectives and behaviors into AI development. By providing this crucial human data infrastructure, Prolific is positioning itself at the forefront of the next wave of AI innovation – one that reflects the breath and the best of humanity.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Working for us will place you at the forefront of AI innovation, providing access to our unique human data platform and opportunities for groundbreaking research. Join us to enjoy a competitive salary, benefits, and remote working within our impactful, mission-driven culture.</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>Links to more information on Prolific</em></span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.notion.so/prolific/dbc97f2b3ff24f1bb6fa834a2c9c3283?v=4f874e88e46a4f54afd8bf62f1db19ed&amp;p=9f2c1de05dfa43338d48c20362bfead1&amp;pm=c">Benefits&nbsp;</a></span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.notion.so/prolific/dbc97f2b3ff24f1bb6fa834a2c9c3283?v=4f874e88e46a4f54afd8bf62f1db19ed">External Handbook</a>&nbsp;</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.prolific.com/">Website&nbsp;</a></span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.youtube.com/@JoinProlific">Youtube</a>&nbsp;</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>Privacy Statement</em></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">By submitting your application, you agree that Prolific may collect your personal data for recruiting and global organisation planning.
