title: Senior Data Engineer - Managed Services
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Are you looking for a role that motivates and challenges you? Are you ready for an opportunity for growth? Do you want to work on teams where people roll up their sleeves to take on tough problems together, and regularly blow the doors off our clients with their outstanding teamwork? If you answered yes to those questions, 3Cloud might just be for you!</p> <p>At 3Cloud, we hire people who aren’t afraid to experiment or fail. We hire people who are willing to give direct and candid feedback to their managers, leaders, and team members. We hire people who jump at those opportunities because they care about our collective growth and success. We hire people who challenge and hold each other accountable for living 3Cloud’s core values because they know that it will result in amazing experiences and solutions for our clients and each other.</p></div><p>Senior Data Engineer - Managed Services<br>Responsibilities<br>• Support of client’s Azure Data platform and Power BI Environment, including response to any escalations while helping to analyze and resolve incidents for customers environment<br>• Consult, develop and advise on solutions in Microsoft Azure with tools such as SSIS, SSRS, SSAS, Synapse, Data Factory, Databricks, Data Lake, Data Warehouse<br>• Consult, develop, and advise on Power BI, including report development and modeling<br>• Consistently learn, apply, and refine skills around data engineering and data analytics<br>• Design and deploy data pipelines, models, and data driven solutions for clients in various industries<br>• Understand and work with customer on licensing involving Microsoft data solutions, and understand the limits/advantages of each licensing platform<br>• Preparing Data Analytic solutions for customers including importing data from multiple sources, performant star schema data models to be ingested via Power BI, and report and dashboard development.<br>• Communicate ticket status information to all associated parties and escalate cases as appropriate<br>• Interact with clients to identify issues, troubleshoot expediently, and follow up on issues via e-mail, ticketing system, and phone calls. Communicate technical issues and solutions with clients in business terms<br>• Configure, administer, tune and develop client’s data environment based on contracted services<br>• Create and maintain updated documentation for each client’s environment<br>• Promote best practices for clients and internally to enhance and improve organizational processes<br>• Participate in recurring discussions with clients to review current issues and to propose possible solutions<br>• Collaborate with team members and client stakeholders to ensure our solutions align to our client’s needs</p> <p>Requirements</p> <ul> <li>Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, or related field, or equivalent certification</li> <li>Experience working in a support role and understanding standard support processes (i.e. ITIL)</li> <li>5+ years architecting, implementing, and supporting solutions on the Microsoft Azure and Fabric tool stacks for Data &amp; AI (ADF, SQL DW, Azure Synapse, Azure Databricks, Microsoft Fabric Data Engineering, Microsoft Power BI)</li> <li>Strong proficiency in Enterprise Data Warehousing, Semantic Models, Data Lake Architecture, and Metadata-driven ETL processes is required</li> <li>Working familiarity with DevOps/ DataOps, for example experience delivering work using git-based source control and automated deployment pipelines is preferred</li> <li>Working familiarity with AI/ Machine learning use cases on the Microsoft tool stacks for Data &amp; AI is a plus</li> <li>Strong verbal and written communication skills</li> <li>A passion for problem solving and learning new technologies</li> <li>Client relationship skills and experience managing vendors</li> <li>Ability to work in a fast paced, rapidly changing environment</li> <li>Strong desire for personal development and learning, including commitment to continuously upgrading your technical skills as the data landscape change</li> <li>Work remote, but not alone – with a team filled top to bottom with data analytics professionals</li> </ul> <p><br><br>Don’t meet every single requirement? At 3Cloud we are dedicated to building a diverse, inclusive and authentic workplace, so if you’re excited about this role but your experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyway.<br>At this time, we cannot sponsor applicants for work visas.</p> <p><strong>This Job Posting will expire on July 13th, 2026.</strong></p> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><hr> <p><strong>3Cloud Total Rewards Highlights Include:</strong> &nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Flexible work location with a virtual first approach to work! </li> <li>401(K) with match up to 50% of your 6% contributions of eligible pay </li> <li>Generous PTO providing a minimum of 15 days in addition to 9 paid company holidays and 2 floating personal days &nbsp;</li> <li>Two medical plan options to allow you the choice to elect what works best for you!</li> <li>Option for vision and dental coverage </li> <li>100% employer paid coverage for life and disability insurance</li> <li>Paid leave for birth parents and non-birth parents </li> <li>Option for Healthcare FSA, HSA, and Dependent Care FSA</li> <li>$67.00 monthly tech and home office allowance</li> <li>Utilization and/or discretionary bonus eligibility based on role </li> <li>Employee Assistance Program to help with everyday challenges</li> </ul> <p>3Cloud offers competitive compensation. In addition to base pay employees are eligible to receive an annual discretionary/utilization bonus. If you are hired at 3Cloud your final base salary is based on factors such as skills, education, experience and/or geographic location. Please keep in mind that the range mentioned above includes the full base salary range for the role. It is not typical for offers to be made at or near the top of the range.</p></div><div class="title">Base Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$96,500</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$144,800 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p>Don’t meet every single requirement?&nbsp;At 3Cloud we are dedicated to building a diverse, inclusive and authentic workplace, so if you’re excited about this role but your past experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyway.</p> <p><strong>At this time, we cannot sponsor applicants for work visas.</strong></p></div>

title: Senior Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>Welcome to Planet. We believe in using space to help life on Earth.</strong></p> <p>Planet designs, builds, and operates the largest constellation of imaging satellites in history. This constellation delivers an unprecedented dataset of empirical information via a revolutionary cloud-based platform to authoritative figures in commercial, environmental, and humanitarian sectors. We are both a space company and data company all rolled into one.</p> <p>Customers and users across the globe use Planet's data to develop new technologies, drive revenue, power research, and solve our world’s toughest obstacles.</p> <p>As we control every component of hardware design, manufacturing, data processing, and software engineering, our office is a truly inspiring mix of experts from a variety of domains.</p> <p>We have a people-centric approach toward culture and community and we strive to iterate in a way that puts our team members first and prepares our company for growth. Join Planet and be a part of our mission to change the way people see the world.</p> <p>Planet is a global company with employees working remotely world wide and joining us from offices in San Francisco, Washington DC, Germany, Austria, Slovenia, and The Netherlands.</p></div><p><strong>About the Role:</strong></p> <p>As a Senior Data Engineer (DE) at Planet, you will own, architect and build production, enterprise-scale data ecosystems using modern cloud technologies, to power mission-critical, customer-facing products. You will act as a strategic partner to cross-functional stakeholders, translating complex requirements into robust, scalable solutions. You will build and design data solutions end to end: from high-level architecture and implementation to CI/CD, orchestration automated QA, and seamless integration into production systems. You’ll be a senior member of the Data Team within the Software Engineering organization, which is made up of data scientists, engineers and analysts working on similar tasks across Planet domains.&nbsp;</p> <p>Your scope will focus on the architecture and evolution of data systems supporting our global monitoring products. These products are vital offerings designed to provide persistent, high-cadence monitoring and active intelligence, particularly for our Defence and Intelligence customers. You will collaborate closely with leadership across Product and Engineering to ensure some of our most sophisticated customers have the data required for global security and rapid decision-making. This role is ideal for an expert data engineer looking to lead the evolution of complex systems and deliver transformative technology to the defense sector. The ideal candidate is an independent operator who thrives in a dynamic, global environment and is deeply passionate about Planet’s mission and national security solutions.</p> <p>This is a full-time, hybrid role which will require you to work from our Washington DC or Denver CO office 3 days per week.</p> <p><strong>Impact You'll Own:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Architect and oversee robust, high-availability data pipelines while establishing the standards for maintaining, troubleshooting, and optimizing existing ecosystems.</li> <li>Collaborate with global product, commercial and engineering leads and peers to design and execute a long-term data strategy for products in your scope.</li> <li>Drive high-level mentorship, technical design reviews, and architectural integrity across the Data Team while setting standards for code quality.</li> </ul> <p><strong>What You Bring:</strong></p> <ul> <li>10+ years of relevant experience in data engineering with a track record of technical leadership.</li> <li>Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field.</li> <li>Expertise in designing and implementing end-to-end data architectures for global-scale, customer-facing solutions, with a focus on data integrity and efficiency.</li> <li>Expert-level proficiency in Python and SQL for complex ETL/ELT pipeline construction, including event-driven data architectures.</li> <li>Proactive, self-starter mindset with the ability to lead problem-solving initiatives in a dynamic, high-stakes environment.</li> <li>Exceptional communication skills, with the ability to translate between technical execution and high-level business requirements.</li> <li>Deep experience in maintaining enterprise-grade, peer-reviewed codebases and advanced CI/CD workflows using GitLab CI, Docker, and Kubernetes.</li> <li>Significant experience with cloud-native architectures (GCP preferred).</li> <li>Experience tuning storage formats such as Parquet to ensure sub-second query performance for consumers.</li> </ul> <p><strong>What Makes You Stand Out:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience using modern data tooling (e.g. dbt) for pipeline inputs to customer-facing production systems.</li> <li>Experience leveraging Infrastructure as Code tooling (e.g. Terraform) to manage cloud architecture.</li> <li>Experience architecting solutions for geospatial datasets.</li> <li>Knowledge of earth observation and/or satellite operation concepts.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Application Deadline:</strong></p> <p>October 1, 2026 by 11:59p / 23:59 CET (Central European Time)</p> <p><strong>EAR/ITAR Requirements:</strong></p> <p><em>This position requires access to export-controlled information, and as such, employment (or hiring of a contractor) is contingent upon the candidate’s ability to access all applicable export-controlled information without additional export licensing being required by the Bureau of Industry and Security and/or the Directorate of Defense Trade Controls.</em></p> <p><strong>Benefits While Working at Planet:</strong></p> <p><em>These offerings are dependent on employment type and geographical location, based upon applicable law or company policy.</em></p> <ul> <li>Comprehensive Medical, Dental, and Vision plans</li> <li>Health Savings Account (HSA) with a company contribution</li> <li>Generous Paid Time Off in addition to holidays and company-wide days off&nbsp;</li> <li>16 Weeks of Paid Parental Leave</li> <li>Wellness Program and Employee Assistance Program (EAP)</li> <li>Home Office Reimbursement</li> <li>Monthly Phone and Internet Reimbursement</li> <li>Tuition Reimbursement and access to LinkedIn Learning</li> <li>Equity</li> <li>Commuter Benefits (if local to an office)</li> <li>Volunteering Paid Time Off</li> </ul> <p><strong>Compensation:</strong></p> <p>The US base salary range for this full-time position at the commencement of employment is listed below. Additionally, this role might be eligible for discretionary short-term and long-term incentives (bonus and equity). The final salary range is determined by job related experience, skills and location. The range displays our typical hiring range for new hire salaries in US locations only. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process.</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">New York City + California Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$172,200</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$215,200 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">San Francisco Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$182,900</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$228,600 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">US National Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$160,600</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$200,800 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">US National Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$160,600</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$200,800 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance<br></strong>Pursuant to the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records.<strong><br></strong></p> <p><strong>Why we care so much about Belonging.&nbsp;<br></strong>We’re dedicated to helping the whole Planet, and to do that we must strive to represent all of it within each of our offices and on all of our teams. That’s why Planet is guided by an ultimate north star of Belonging—dreaming big as we approach our ongoing work.&nbsp; If this job intrigues you, but you’re thinking you might not have all the qualifications, please... do apply!&nbsp; At Planet, we are looking for well-rounded people from around the world who can contribute to more ways than just what is listed in this job description.&nbsp; We don’t just fill positions, we aspire to fulfill people’s careers, most excited about folks who are motivated by our underlying humanitarian efforts.&nbsp; We are a few orbits around the sun before we get to where we want to be, so we hope you’re excited to come along for the ride.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>EEO statement: <br></strong>Planet is committed to building a community where everyone belongs and we invite people from all backgrounds to apply. Planet is an equal opportunity employer, and committed to providing employment opportunities regardless of race, religious creed, color, national origin, ancestry, physical disability, mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, marital status, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, pregnancy, childbirth and breastfeeding, age, sexual orientation, military or veteran status, or any other protected classification, in accordance with applicable federal, state, and local laws. <a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12.pdf">Know Your Rights.</a></p> <p><strong>Accommodations:&nbsp;<br></strong>Planet is an inclusive community and we know that everyone has their own needs. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation during the hiring process, please reach out to accommodations@planet.com or contact your recruiter with your request. Your message will be confidential and we will be happy to assist you.</p> <p><strong>Privacy Policy</strong>: By clicking "Apply Now" at the top of this job posting, I acknowledge that I have read the <a href="https://www.planet.com/privacy/#california">Planet Data Privacy Notice for California Staff Members and Applicants</a>, and hereby consent to the collection, processing, use, and storage of my personal information as described therein.</p> <p><strong>Privacy Policy (European Applicants):</strong> By clicking "Apply Now" at the top of this job posting, I acknowledge that I have read the <a href="https://www.planet.com/privacy/">Candidate Privacy Notice GDPR Planet Labs Europe</a>, and hereby consent to the collection, processing, use, and storage of my personal information as described therein.</p> <p><strong>AI in Our Interviewing Process</strong>: Planet is committed to providing an exceptional interview experience for all candidates. We currently use <a href="https://www.metaview.ai/" target="_blank">Metaview</a> to better focus on candidates and less on trying to capture notes. As such, with the candidate's consent, select interviews may be recorded and include a "Planet AI Notetaker" for transcription and summarization purposes. Should an interview involve use of AI interview technologies, the candidate will receive notification and have the ability to opt out both in advance and/or real-time. Opting out will not affect one's candidacy.</p> <p><strong>Candidate AI Policy</strong>: Planet embraces Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools, and we encourage its responsible use. We understand that candidates may use various resources, including AI tools, to <em>prepare</em> for interviews and assessments. However, <em>during any live interview stage or when actively completing assessments for this position, the use of AI tools—e.g. Large Language Models (LLMs), deep fake technology, etc.—is strictly prohibited unless explicitly prompted by an interviewer or assessment instructions</em>. If you are unsure about acceptable use, please contact your recruiter for clarification. If an AI tool or similar technology is desired as an accommodation, please contact accommodations@planet.com with your request for assistance. Your message will be confidential, and we will be happy to assist you. Violation of this policy may result in disqualification of your application.</p></div>

title: Senior Data Engineer, Constellation Services
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>Welcome to Planet. We believe in using space to help life on Earth.</strong></p> <p>Planet designs, builds, and operates the largest constellation of imaging satellites in history. This constellation delivers an unprecedented dataset of empirical information via a revolutionary cloud-based platform to authoritative figures in commercial, environmental, and humanitarian sectors. We are both a space company and data company all rolled into one.</p> <p>Customers and users across the globe use Planet's data to develop new technologies, drive revenue, power research, and solve our world’s toughest obstacles.</p> <p>As we control every component of hardware design, manufacturing, data processing, and software engineering, our office is a truly inspiring mix of experts from a variety of domains.</p> <p>We have a people-centric approach toward culture and community and we strive to iterate in a way that puts our team members first and prepares our company for growth. Join Planet and be a part of our mission to change the way people see the world.</p> <p>Planet is a global company with employees working remotely world wide and joining us from offices in San Francisco, Washington DC, Germany, Austria, Slovenia, and The Netherlands.</p></div><p><strong>About the Role:&nbsp;&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>As a Senior Data Engineer (DE) at Planet, you will own, design and build enterprise ETL pipelines and self-service data tooling using modern cloud technologies. You will work closely with cross-functional stakeholders across the company to understand their needs and to deliver robust, flexible solutions and clear insights to meet those needs. You will build data solutions end to end: architecture, implementation, CI/CD and orchestration of pipelines, QA, visualization and effective data communication. You’ll be part of the Data Team within the Software Engineering organization, which is made up of data scientists, engineers and analysts working on similar tasks across Planet domains.&nbsp;</p> <p>You will own the ongoing evolution of data solutions supporting monitoring and analysis of Planet’s Missions team and Constellation Services (CxS) products, a new line of products which support large customers in buying secure access and reserved capacity on our satellites. You will collaborate closely with CxS-focused counterparts on our Product, Engineering, Space Systems and Commercial orgs to ensure they have the data they need to evaluate the success of the products. This role will appeal to candidates who are looking for opportunities to evolve a complex data system end to end and bring needed technology to the defense and intelligence sector.</p> <p>This is a full-time, hybrid role which will require you to work from our Berlin office 3 days per week.</p> <p><strong>Impact You’ll Own:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Develop and own robust, accurate data pipelines as well as maintain, troubleshoot, and improve existing ones&nbsp;</li> <li>Deliver self-service data tooling, visualizations and insights needed to drive decision making and monitoring around CxS products&nbsp;</li> <li>Collaborate with stakeholders, your manager and peers to define and develop the CxS data roadmap</li> <li>Provide mentorship, technical design feedback and code reviews for peers within your team and across the broader org</li> </ul> <p><strong>What You Bring:</strong></p> <ul> <li>6+ years of relevant experience</li> <li>Bachelors’ degree in a relevant field&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience designing and implementing data architecture for data solutions end to end, from ingestion through insight and with an eye for data accuracy</li> <li>Expertise in Python and SQL ETL pipeline buildout&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience with the modern data stack: Fivetran, dbt, Looker/Omni/Sigma, or similar</li> <li>Ability to be a self-starter for solving problems in a dynamic environment</li> <li>Ability to clearly communicate and collaborate with cross-functional teams</li> <li>Experience with maintaining peer-reviewed code and continuous integration and deployment workflows and tooling like GitLab CI and Docker or similar</li> <li>Experience with cloud architectures and services, such as Google Cloud Platform (preferred) or AWS</li> <li>Experience working with geospatial datasets and event-based data architectures</li> </ul> <p><strong>What Makes You Stand Out:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience with messaging services (Pub/Sub, RabbitMQ, etc) and real-time streaming</li> <li>Experience with monitoring and observability tools like Datadog, Grafana, or equivalent</li> <li>Knowledge of earth observation and/or satellite operation concepts</li> </ul> <p><strong>Application Deadline:</strong></p> <p>October 8, 2026 by 11:59p / 23:59 CET (Central European Time)</p> <p><strong>Benefits While Working at Planet:</strong></p> <p><em>These offerings are dependent on employment type and geographical location, based upon applicable law or company policy.</em></p> <ul> <li>Paid time off including vacation, holidays and company-wide days off&nbsp;</li> <li>Employee Wellness Program&nbsp;</li> <li>Home Office Reimbursement</li> <li>Monthly Phone and Internet Reimbursement</li> <li>Tuition Reimbursement and access to LinkedIn Learning</li> <li>Equity&nbsp;</li> <li>Volunteering Paid Time Off</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance<br></strong>Pursuant to the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records.<strong><br></strong></p> <p><strong>Why we care so much about Belonging.&nbsp;<br></strong>We’re dedicated to helping the whole Planet, and to do that we must strive to represent all of it within each of our offices and on all of our teams. That’s why Planet is guided by an ultimate north star of Belonging—dreaming big as we approach our ongoing work.&nbsp; If this job intrigues you, but you’re thinking you might not have all the qualifications, please... do apply!&nbsp; At Planet, we are looking for well-rounded people from around the world who can contribute to more ways than just what is listed in this job description.&nbsp; We don’t just fill positions, we aspire to fulfill people’s careers, most excited about folks who are motivated by our underlying humanitarian efforts.&nbsp; We are a few orbits around the sun before we get to where we want to be, so we hope you’re excited to come along for the ride.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>EEO statement: <br></strong>Planet is committed to building a community where everyone belongs and we invite people from all backgrounds to apply. Planet is an equal opportunity employer, and committed to providing employment opportunities regardless of race, religious creed, color, national origin, ancestry, physical disability, mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, marital status, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, pregnancy, childbirth and breastfeeding, age, sexual orientation, military or veteran status, or any other protected classification, in accordance with applicable federal, state, and local laws. <a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12.pdf">Know Your Rights.</a></p> <p><strong>Accommodations:&nbsp;<br></strong>Planet is an inclusive community and we know that everyone has their own needs. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation during the hiring process, please reach out to accommodations@planet.com or contact your recruiter with your request. Your message will be confidential and we will be happy to assist you.</p> <p><strong>Privacy Policy</strong>: By clicking "Apply Now" at the top of this job posting, I acknowledge that I have read the <a href="https://www.planet.com/privacy/#california">Planet Data Privacy Notice for California Staff Members and Applicants</a>, and hereby consent to the collection, processing, use, and storage of my personal information as described therein.</p> <p><strong>Privacy Policy (European Applicants):</strong> By clicking "Apply Now" at the top of this job posting, I acknowledge that I have read the <a href="https://www.planet.com/privacy/">Candidate Privacy Notice GDPR Planet Labs Europe</a>, and hereby consent to the collection, processing, use, and storage of my personal information as described therein.</p> <p><strong>AI in Our Interviewing Process</strong>: Planet is committed to providing an exceptional interview experience for all candidates. We currently use <a href="https://www.metaview.ai/" target="_blank">Metaview</a> to better focus on candidates and less on trying to capture notes. As such, with the candidate's consent, select interviews may be recorded and include a "Planet AI Notetaker" for transcription and summarization purposes. Should an interview involve use of AI interview technologies, the candidate will receive notification and have the ability to opt out both in advance and/or real-time. Opting out will not affect one's candidacy.</p> <p><strong>Candidate AI Policy</strong>: Planet embraces Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools, and we encourage its responsible use. We understand that candidates may use various resources, including AI tools, to <em>prepare</em> for interviews and assessments. However, <em>during any live interview stage or when actively completing assessments for this position, the use of AI tools—e.g. Large Language Models (LLMs), deep fake technology, etc.—is strictly prohibited unless explicitly prompted by an interviewer or assessment instructions</em>. If you are unsure about acceptable use, please contact your recruiter for clarification. If an AI tool or similar technology is desired as an accommodation, please contact accommodations@planet.com with your request for assistance. Your message will be confidential, and we will be happy to assist you. Violation of this policy may result in disqualification of your application.</p></div>

title: Senior Forward Deployed Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>Welcome to Planet. We believe in using space to help life on Earth.</strong></p> <p>Planet designs, builds, and operates the largest constellation of imaging satellites in history. Join Planet and be a part of our mission to change the way people see the world.</p> <p>Planet is a global company with employees working remotely world wide and joining us from offices in San Francisco, Washington DC, Germany, Austria, Slovenia, and The Netherlands.</p></div><p><strong>About the Role:</strong></p> <p>We are seeking a Senior Forward Deployed Engineer to help develop transformative solutions for our most strategic accounts, starting with our Global Defense and Security customers. In this role, you will work directly with key partners, acting as a senior technical contributor and hands-on builder within a collaborative engineering team. Your mission will be to tackle complex, mission-critical customer challenges by building high-impact software solutions.</p> <p>You will have a high degree of autonomy to design and build what is needed, turning ambiguous requirements into functional and reliable software. Your work will directly contribute to delivering on critical customer commitments and will help inform future product development. This role is ideal for an individual contributor who thrives in dynamic environments and enjoys taking ownership of complex technical problems from design to delivery.</p> <p>This is a full-time, remote position based in the United States. If located near an office, you are expected to work from that office 3 days per week.</p> <p><strong>Impact You'll Own:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Contribute to the full development lifecycle: from discovery and decomposition to designing, building, and deploying bespoke solutions for customer challenges.</li> <li>Design and develop robust, full-stack software, including front-end, back-end, data integration, cloud infrastructure (e.g., AWS), and CI/CD pipelines.</li> <li>Work directly with customers to understand their operational challenges and translate them into clear technical requirements.</li> <li>Identify reusable patterns in customer solutions to inform broader platform development.</li> <li>Leverage the latest AI tooling and an AI-first mindset to drive rapid iteration, deliver value quickly, and adapt to evolving requirements with a bias for action.</li> <li>Mentor other engineers, contribute to code reviews, and help foster a collaborative team environment.</li> <li>Deliver critical commitments on time, understanding their direct impact on customer relationships and business objectives.</li> </ul> <p><strong>What You Bring:</strong></p> <ul> <li>6+ years of relevant work experience in software engineering or in an equivalent technical role.</li> <li>Experience with geospatial software development and concepts (e.g., Rasterio, Fiona, Shapely, OpenLayers, GDAL).</li> <li>AWS or GCP experience.</li> <li>Proficiency in Python.</li> <li>Excellent knowledge of software engineering best practices, including coding standards, code reviews, source control management, and testing methodologies.</li> <li>Excellent customer engagement skills, with the ability to communicate complex technical concepts to diverse audiences.</li> <li>Experience with fast, iterative development cycles and an ability to adapt to shifting requirements.</li> <li>Willingness to travel 30-50% to customer sites within the region.</li> <li>Must have a current active security clearance (TS or TS/TSI).</li> </ul> <p><strong>What Makes You Stand Out:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience with JavaScript, Java, Go or C#.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Application Deadline:</strong></p> <p>September 116, 2026 by 11:59p PT</p> <p><strong>Benefits While Working at Planet:</strong></p> <p><em>These offerings are dependent on employment type contribution</li> <li>Generous Paid Time Off in addition to holidays and company-wide days off&nbsp;</li> <li>16 Weeks of Paid Parental Leave</li> <li>Wellness Program and Employee Assistance Program (EAP)</li> <li>Home Office Reimbursement</li> <li>Monthly Phone and Internet Reimbursement</li> <li>Tuition Reimbursement and access to LinkedIn Learning</li> <li>Equity</li> <li>Commuter Benefits (if local to an office)</li> <li>Volunteering Paid Time Off</li> </ul> <p><strong>Compensation:</strong></p> <p>The US base salary range for this full-time position at the commencement of employment is listed below.&nbsp; Additionally, this role might be eligible for discretionary short-term and long-term incentives (bonus and equity). The final salary range is determined by job related experience, skills and location.&nbsp; The range displays our typical hiring range for new hire salaries in US locations only.&nbsp; Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process.</p> <p>#LI-REMOTE</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">New York City + California Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$172,200</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$215,200 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">San Francisco Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$182,900</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$228,600 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">US National Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$160,600</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$200,800 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance<br></strong>Pursuant to the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records.<strong><br></strong></p> <p><strong>Why we care so much about Belonging.&nbsp;<br></strong>We’re dedicated to helping the whole Planet, and to do that we must strive to represent all of it within each of our offices and on all of our teams. title: Senior Analytics Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We&nbsp;take play seriously. We’re looking for curious adventurers ready to find their party, fueled by imagination&nbsp;and drive&nbsp;to build what’s never been built before. At Hasbro and Wizards of the Coast, you’ll collaborate with passionate teams to reimagine our iconic brands and create experiences that spark joy, connection, and community through the magic of play. This is your chance to shape legendary play that lasts a lifetime.</span></p></div><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Hasbro is a leading games, IP and toy company whose mission is to create joy and community through the magic of play. With 165 years of expertise, Hasbro delivers groundbreaking play experiences and reaches more than 1 billion fans annually around the world, through physical and digital games, video games, toys, licensed consumer products, location-based entertainment, film, TV and more.</span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Through its franchise-first approach, Hasbro unlocks value from both new and legacy IP, including MAGIC: THE GATHERING, DUNGEONS &amp; DRAGONS, MONOPOLY, HASBRO GAMES, NERF, TRANSFORMERS, PLAY-DOH and PEPPA PIG, as well as premier partner brands. Powered by its portfolio of thousands of iconic marks and a diversified network of partners and subsidiary studios, Hasbro brings fans together wherever they are, from tabletop to screen.</span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">For more than a decade, Hasbro has been consistently recognized for its corporate citizenship, including being named one of the 100 Best Corporate Citizens by 3BL Media, a 2025 JUST Capital Industry Leader, one of the 50 Most Community-Minded Companies in the U.S. by the Civic 50, and a Brand that Matters by Fast Company. For more information, visit <a href="https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcorporate.hasbro.com%2F&amp;data=05%7C02%7CChristian.Porter%40wizards.com%7C1c2f0acd383b4d9e4c5108de85197b24%7C701edd3ec7a84789b1ce8a243620d68f%7C0%7C0%7C639094541651889218%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&amp;sdata=I%2BUPsw2L44lwcMF%2BB2tJ0pKHlspdHMsqJgCKs9w8oQc%3D&amp;reserved=0">https://corporate.hasbro.com</a> or @Hasbro on LinkedIn.</span></p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;">&nbsp;</p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We are growing our&nbsp;<strong>Enterprise Data &amp; Engineering</strong> team!</span></p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;">&nbsp;</p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We're looking for a <strong>Senior Analytics Engineer</strong> to help shape how data is transformed, modeled, and structured to power analytics and business decision-making across the enterprise. Are you energized by turning complex data into scalable, trusted, analytics-ready data products that drive real impact?</span></p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;">&nbsp;</p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">In this high-impact individual contributor role, you will design enterprise data models and semantic layers that define how we measure performance and consume data. Together, we are building production-grade transformation frameworks and curated datasets that ensure reporting and business metrics are accurate, consistent, and performant.</span></p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;">&nbsp;</p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We value diverse perspectives and welcome candidates who bring different experiences and approaches to solving complex data challenges.</span></p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;">&nbsp;</p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>What You'll Do</strong></span></p> <ul style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 0.0in;" type="disc"> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Responsible for the design and evolution of analytics-ready data models, dimensional schemas, and curated datasets.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Own the development of transformation frameworks using DBT, Databricks, and cloud-native technologies.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Translate business requirements into scalable, reusable data models that standardize metric definitions across teams.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Establish and uphold modeling standards, semantic layer governance, naming conventions, documentation practices, and testing frameworks.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Implement and monitor data quality validation, lineage, and transformation-level controls.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Partner closely with data engineers to align upstream pipeline design with downstream modeling and consumption needs.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Collaborate with product managers, analysts, and business partners to ensure data products are intuitive, trusted, and aligned to business definitions.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Lead analytics engineering initiatives from technical design through deployment and optimization.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Recognize opportunities to simplify the analytics data landscape as well as improve performance.</span></li> </ul> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;">&nbsp;</p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>What You'll Bring</strong></span></p> <ul style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 0.0in;" type="disc"> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Experience developing and delivering enterprise-scale analytics frameworks and data transformation structures in modern data environments.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Strong hands-on expertise with SQL, DBT, and Databricks, as well as cloud data platforms such as Azure and/or AWS.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Proficiency in Python or similar language for transformation logic, automation, and validation workflows.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Deep understanding of dimensional modeling, semantic layer architecture, and data warehousing standard methodologies.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Experience implementing data quality frameworks, automated testing, and documentation standards.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Ability to lead complex workstreams and influence technical decisions without direct authority.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Strong interpersonal skills, with the ability to translate data concepts into clear business-aligned structures.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Experience supporting advanced analytics or AI-enabled use cases is a plus.</span></li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong><span style="color: black;">We are an Equal Opportunity / Affirmative Action Employer</span></strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Hasbro is committed to equality of opportunity in all aspects of employment. We are committed to making all employment decisions without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, age, marital status, or any other legally protected status.</span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. If you have a disability and require assistance in this application process and need to request an accommodation, please contact your recruiter or coordinator.</span></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><span style="font-size: 16px;" data-teams="true">The pay transparency range for this role is listed below. The hiring range will vary based on factors such as experience, skills, location and market conditions. Additionally, employees may be eligible for annual and long-term incentives as part of their overall compensation package.</span></p></div><div class="title">Pay Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$100,200</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$150,200 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Employees may be eligible for annual and long-term incentives as part of their overall compensation package, depending on role, location, and eligibility. Benefits and programs may include:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Health &amp; Wellness</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Time Off to Recharge</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Financial Well-being</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Life &amp; Family Support</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Volunteer and Community Initiatives</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Learning &amp; Development&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Exclusive Perks</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><span data-olk-copy-source="MailCompose">Please review our </span><a id="OWAf3b48604-66ff-cab5-fa36-85c2d05d437e" class="OWAAutoLink" href="https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=http%3A%2F%2Fdocs.hasbro.com%2Fprivacy%2Fjob-applicant&amp;data=05%7C02%7CMaria.Hughes%40wizards.com%7C73f450b2476e4441be3308dec7006d14%7C701edd3ec7a84789b1ce8a243620d68f%7C0%7C0%7C639167001791388387%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&amp;sdata=QzsYnPcynaB0OC2yYMSHab2TyW8jOlZQWyr87FBwDt8%3D&amp;reserved=0" data-auth="NotApplicable">Applicant Privacy Notice</a> to learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information in connection with the application process.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><br></span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"></span></p></div>

title: Sr Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We&nbsp;take play seriously. We’re looking for curious adventurers ready to find their party, fueled by imagination&nbsp;and drive&nbsp;to build what’s never been built before. At Hasbro and Wizards of the Coast, you’ll collaborate with passionate teams to reimagine our iconic brands and create experiences that spark joy, connection, and community through the magic of play. This is your chance to shape legendary play that lasts a lifetime.</span></p></div><p>Hasbro is a leading games, IP and toy company whose mission is to create joy and community through the magic of play. With 165 years of expertise, Hasbro delivers groundbreaking play experiences and reaches more than 1 billion fans annually around the world, through physical and digital games, video games, toys, licensed consumer products, location-based entertainment, film, TV and more.&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <p>Through its franchise-first approach, Hasbro unlocks value from both new and legacy IP, including MAGIC: THE GATHERING, DUNGEONS &amp; DRAGONS, MONOPOLY, HASBRO GAMES, NERF, TRANSFORMERS, PLAY-DOH and PEPPA PIG, as well as premier partner brands. Powered by its portfolio of thousands of iconic marks and a diversified network of partners and subsidiary studios, Hasbro brings fans together wherever they are, from tabletop to screen.&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>For more than a decade, Hasbro has been consistently recognized for its corporate citizenship, including being named one of the 100 Best Corporate Citizens by 3BL Media, a 2025 JUST Capital Industry Leader, one of the 50 Most Community-Minded Companies in the U.S. by the Civic 50, and a Brand that Matters by Fast Company. For more information, visit https://corporate.hasbro.com or @Hasbro on LinkedIn.&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>We are growing our Enterprise Data &amp; Engineering team!</strong></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Do you have a passion for data and a drive to build things that matter? We’re looking for a Senior Data Engineer to join our high-visibility Enterprise Data &amp; Engineering team, helping Hasbro better reach consumers with compelling products and entertainment. This is an impactful role for a technically strong engineer who excels at designing and delivering production-grade data solutions independently and as a collaborative partner!</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>In this role, you will take ownership of complex data pipelines, transformations, and analytics infrastructure that power decision-making across the business. You’ll work closely with data scientists, analytics engineers, and business partners, contributing deep technical expertise to modern cloud data platforms and code-based engineering practices. We believe great data engineering is a craft, and we’re building a team that takes that seriously.</p> <p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p> <p><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></p> <ul> <li>Design, build, and optimize scalable data pipelines, transformations, and data models that underpin analytics and data products.</li> <li>Own end-to-end delivery of data engineering initiatives, from technical design and planning through production rollout and ongoing support.</li> <li>Write and tune complex SQL queries and Python-based pipeline code to support analytics, reporting, and data modeling needs.</li> <li>Drive engineering best practices across the team, including version-controlled development via GitHub (or equivalent), CI/CD, automated testing, observability, and documentation.</li> <li>Lead data architecture and design decisions for new and evolving data products, ensuring solutions are scalable, well-governed, and performant.</li> <li>Collaborate with data scientists, analytics engineers, and business partners to understand data needs and deliver high-quality, consumable data products.</li> <li>Support data quality monitoring and validation efforts, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and reliability across data products.</li> <li>Develop and apply data governance principles, including metadata management and data lineage.</li> <li>Contribute to code reviews, technical documentation, and a culture of engineering excellence.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>What You’ll Bring</strong></p> <ul> <li>4–7 years of hands-on experience in data engineering or a closely related field.</li> <li>Strong hands-on expertise with Databricks and cloud data platforms such as Azure and/or AWS.</li> <li>Deep proficiency in SQL, data modeling, and Python for data pipeline development, transformation logic, and automation.</li> <li>Solid experience with version control using GitHub (or a comparable platform), including branching strategies, pull requests, and code review workflows.</li> <li>Experience with DBT (data build tool) is a strong plus — particularly around testing, writing modular and reusable transformations, and optimizing how data models are built and maintained.</li> <li>Proven ability to deliver end-to-end data products, from build through production deployment and ongoing support.</li> <li>Experience with code-first orchestration tools (e.g., Databricks Asset Bundles, Airflow, or similar); familiarity with Databricks Asset Bundles (DABs) is a plus but not required.</li> <li>Familiarity with or curiosity about AI-enabled development tools (such as Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, or similar coding assistants) and an interest in leveraging them to write better code, accelerate development, and improve engineering workflows.</li> <li>Working knowledge of data governance fundamentals, including data quality, metadata, and lineage.</li> <li>Understanding of CI/CD principles and automated testing in data pipeline development.</li> <li>Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to work effectively across technical and non-technical teams.</li> <li>Bachelor’s or master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field, with equivalent experience accepted.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Compensation and benefits may vary based on location and role.</p> <p>At Hasbro, we believe in the magic of diversity—great ideas come from unique perspectives. We are committed to building an inclusive, welcoming workplace where everyone belongs. Wizards is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate based on race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, marital status, or any other legally protected status.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Hasbro will provide reasonable accommodations with the application process, upon your request, as required to comply with applicable laws. If you have a disability and require assistance in this application process, please contact your recruiter or coordinator.&nbsp;</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><span style="font-size: 16px;" data-teams="true">The pay transparency range for this role is listed below. The hiring range will vary based on factors such as experience, skills, location and market conditions. Additionally, employees may be eligible for annual and long-term incentives as part of their overall compensation package.</span></p></div><div class="title">Pay Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$124,500</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$186,800 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Employees may be eligible for annual and long-term incentives as part of their overall compensation package, depending on role, location, and eligibility. Benefits and programs may include:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Health &amp; Wellness</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Time Off to Recharge</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Financial Well-being</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Life &amp; Family Support</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Volunteer and Community Initiatives</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Learning &amp; Development&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Exclusive Perks</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><span data-olk-copy-source="MailCompose">Please review our </span><a id="OWAf3b48604-66ff-cab5-fa36-85c2d05d437e" class="OWAAutoLink" href="https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=http%3A%2F%2Fdocs.hasbro.com%2Fprivacy%2Fjob-applicant&amp;data=05%7C02%7CMaria.Hughes%40wizards.com%7C73f450b2476e4441be3308dec7006d14%7C701edd3ec7a84789b1ce8a243620d68f%7C0%7C0%7C639167001791388387%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&amp;sdata=QzsYnPcynaB0OC2yYMSHab2TyW8jOlZQWyr87FBwDt8%3D&amp;reserved=0" data-auth="NotApplicable">Applicant Privacy Notice</a> to learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information in connection with the application process.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><br></span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"></span></p></div>

title: Senior Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><img src="https://hi-contentful.imgix.net/4xN7JhmwCRuz3y9M8L8CF7/5c244c52cfc982bd1a348a80dc35d43b/hi-logo-new.svg?auto=format&amp;ixlib=react-9.0.3&amp;h=40&amp;w=132&amp;q=50&amp;dpr=2" alt="hi-logo" width="132" style="max-width: 100%;"></p></div><p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Human Interest is on a mission to ensure that people in all lines of work have access to retirement benefits.</strong>&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">More than half of all working Americans are not saving enough for their future. Too often, it’s because they are employed by a company that doesn’t offer a retirement plan. Human Interest is changing that by making it affordable and accessible for small and medium-sized businesses to offer employees a path to financial independence through retirement savings.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">We’re a high-growth fintech company changing the retirement industry. We are backed by a number of investors. This includes funding from Marshall Wace and Baillie Gifford, as well as top investors such as BlackRock, TPG (The Rise Fund), SoftBank, Glynn Capital, NewView Capital, USVP, Wing, Uncork, and more.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>About the role</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">As a Senior Data Engineer on the Data Access team, you will be a technical anchor for Human Interest’s data platform at a pivotal moment in Human Interest's growth. This role exists to build and own the infrastructure that ensures the data powering our products, our customer reporting, and our business metrics are reliable and well governed. You will drive the evolution of our data platform toward an architecture that scales for AI consumption and for Human Interest's next growth stage. This is a high-ownership role where your architectural decisions will have a direct and visible impact on Human Interest's capabilities.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">The Data Access team is Human Interest's internal data platform team. We own the full data stack from ingestion and orchestration through transformation, governance, and delivery to BI tools. Our stack includes Snowflake, dbt, Airflow, Meltano, and Terraform on AWS. We're a small, highly collaborative team embedded within the HI Tech organization, working closely with Analysts, Finance, Product, and engineering teams to ensure that the data people rely on is trustworthy and accessible.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You'll have the opportunity to shape how we evolve our architecture towards AI-consumption and to set the standard for how production data assets are built, certified, and maintained at Human Interest. The team actively uses AI tools as part of our development workflow, and we expect this role to help drive and expand that practice across the team.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>What you get to do every day</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Define and maintain data governance standards including access controls, data lineage, and contracts between data producers and consumers</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Lead the technical direction and evolution of our data platform as we move toward an AI-first data infrastructure. You will design for AI consumption, unstructured data access, and integration with AI tooling from the ground up.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Build and scale data pipelines and architectures that make data accessible and useful to both human analysts and AI systems.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Own end-to-end design and development of scalable data pipelines, from ingestion and orchestration to transformation and delivery, using tools including AWS, Terraform, Airflow, Snowflake, dbt, Meltano, Python.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Drive data platform reliability through performance optimization, data quality monitoring, and SLA-based prioritization of our most critical data assets.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Leverage and champion AI-assisted development tools, including Claude Code, to accelerate development velocity across the team.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Mentor data engineers and analysts, raising the technical bar across the team.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>What you bring to the role</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">5+ years of experience as a Data Engineer with a strong focus on production data pipelines and data infrastructure development.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Strong experience with AWS data services in a production context, including storage, compute, and pipeline tooling.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Hands-on experience with managing cloud data warehouse technologies, including Snowflake or equivalent, covering access control, performance tuning, and cost management.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Strong Python skills, with the ability to independently own and improve complex production data pipelines.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience with workflow orchestration at scale, including Airflow or equivalent tools.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Familiarity with data governance, observability, and data quality practices.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Familiarity with event sourcing or change data capture-based data patterns.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">A strong desire to leverage AI tools and workflow automation to improve team productivity.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Nice to haves:</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience with data lakehouse architectures and open table formats such as Apache Iceberg or Delta Lake.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience with dbt-core in a production repository.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience building data infrastructure to support AI-driven data access such as exposing data assets via MCP, implementing governance frameworks for AI data access, and curating, monitoring and evaluating the quality of AI-generated query responses.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Background in fintech, financial services, or another highly regulated or compliance-driven industry.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Please feel free to apply to this position even if you do not meet 100% of the requirements listed above.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Why you will love working at Human Interest</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Human Interest is tackling one of our country's biggest challenges - closing the retirement gap. You'll be instrumental in architecting and scaling solutions that bring financial security to employees at small and medium-sized businesses nationwide. We’ve made significant progress, but there is still growth ahead, offering you a unique opportunity to solve complex problems, drive innovation, and advance your career alongside a dedicated, mission-driven team. We value hard work and recognize that our team's contributions are key to our continued success.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Join Human Interest and make a lasting impact by shaping the future of retirement.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Our operating principles define how we work together as a team. They reflect Human Interest’s unique view on what’s important and what’s right. Documenting this core aspect of our culture helps employees make good decisions on their own. It also helps candidates considering career opportunities critically evaluate whether they will thrive at Human Interest.&nbsp;</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Customer obsession</strong>: We're all about creating amazing experiences for our customers. We put their needs first and go the extra mile to make them smile.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Long-Term Orientation</strong>: We're not just playing for today; we're building a legacy. We think big, plan strategically, and invest in our future.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Autonomous and Accountable Teams</strong>: We trust our team members to take ownership and make smart decisions. We empower you to be your best self!</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>An Escalating Bar for Talent and Performance</strong>: We're constantly raising the bar and challenging ourselves to be better. We believe in growth and continuous improvement.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Fundamental Optimism</strong>: We see the glass as half full (and then we fill it up with more amazing ideas!). We believe in the power of positivity and the potential for greatness.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Compensation</strong> - At Human Interest, there are a number of factors that are used to determine the appropriate pay range for each position. We take into account the cost of labor for each position in various markets across the U.S. The base salary for this position spans <strong>$171,000 - $207,000 </strong>and represents the minimum in our lowest geographic region to a maximum<strong> </strong>in our highest geographic region. The salary we offer to a new employee within this range is based on their location within the U.S., their relevant job-related skills, and experience. At Human Interest, base salary is one component of the overall total rewards package. Depending on the position, additional compensation components such as bonuses, commissions, and equity may be offered. All of our employees are offered a robust suite of physical, financial, and mental wellness benefits. In compliance with applicable laws, we do not inquire about salary history, or about criminal history prior to a conditional offer of employment.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Benefits</strong> -&nbsp;</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">A great 401(k) plan: Our own! Our 401(k) includes a dollar-for-dollar employer match up to 4% of compensation (immediately vested) and $0 plan fees</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Top-of-the-line health plans, as well as dental and vision insurance</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Competitive time off and parental leave</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Addition Wealth:&nbsp; Unlimited access to digital tools, financial professionals, and a knowledge center to help you understand your equity and support your financial wellness</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Lyra: Enhanced Mental Health Support for Employees and dependents&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Carrot: Fertility healthcare and family forming benefits</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Candidly:&nbsp; Student loan resource to help you and your family plan, borrow, and repay student debt</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Monthly work-from-home stipend; quarterly lifestyle stipend</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Engaging team-building experiences, ranging from virtual social events to team offsites, promoting collaboration and camaraderie.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>We’re a great place to work</strong> (but don’t take our word for it)&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Here’s a list of our awards and accolades:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Certified as a Great Place To Work® (2023-2025)</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Fortune Best Place to Work in the Bay Area (2024)</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Best Places to Work by Built In (2023-2024)</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">America’s Best Startup Employers by Forbes (2020-2022, 2024)&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">A Top Company by Y Combinator (2020-2023)</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Inc. Fastest Growing Companies (2021)</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Human Interest is an equal opportunity employer. All applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, veteran or military status, pregnancy, or any other characteristics protected under federal, state, or local laws. Employment with Human Interest is at-will, meaning either you or the company may terminate employment at any time, with or without cause or notice, except as otherwise provided by law or written agreement.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">We are committed to making every stage of our application process fully accessible to all individuals. If you need a reasonable accommodation at any point in the process, please let us know at applicantaccommodations@humaninterest.com.</span><br><br><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Protect yourself against fraud and identity theft</strong>. Apply to our open positions directly via our careers page on Greenhouse. Human Interest will never ask applicants for their financial or banking information as part of our application process. All legitimate communication will come from a @humaninterest.com email address. If you have questions, please reach out to us directly at careers@humaninterest.com</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Please note Human Interest does not accept unsolicited resumes from any source other than directly from candidates. We will not consider resumes from vendors, including and without limitation search firms, staffing agencies, fee-based referral services, and recruiting agencies.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Pursuant to the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider employment-qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records. We comply with <strong>CCPA</strong><strong> </strong>guidelines.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">See more: https://humaninterest.com/disclosures</span></p>

title: Senior Data Engineer
full_description: <p data-renderer-start-pos="1"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">About us:</strong></p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="12">Branch is on a mission to empower workers with financial freedom. We do this by helping companies accelerate payments and providing working Americans with accessible, free financial services. We’re committed to building and delivering more inclusive, transparent, and frictionless financial products.</p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="314">Our goal of empowerment extends to our own employees, too. Have a great idea? Share it today and it might just get implemented tomorrow. As a member of our team, your voice and creativity matter—and they can directly impact our products, company, and culture.&nbsp;</p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="576">We not only focus on attracting great talent from across the country, but also on building teams that help that talent thrive. That means valuing a diversity of opinions and working styles, while creating a shared belief in innovation, initiative, and winning together.</p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="847">Come join our team as we develop new ways to improve the lives of working Americans.</p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="1"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">About the role:</strong></p> <p>Branch helps millions of workers get paid faster and manage their money better. Our team is responsible for the data that drives many critical processes at Branch, including money movement, automated fraud response, and client reporting.&nbsp;</p> <p>We're looking for a Senior Data Engineer to join our Data Engineering team. In this role, you’ll work with other engineers and stakeholders to build and maintain the pipelines that power the rest of Branch. You'll drive design decisions, build reusable patterns and components other engineers adopt, and make the tradeoffs across cost, performance, and maintainability that keep our platform fast and trustworthy as we scale.</p> <p>This is a great role for an experienced data engineer who wants to own systems end-to-end and shape how the team builds going forward. Our team is small, high-trust, and values clarity, maintainability, and getting the details right.</p> <p><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></p> <ul> <li>Own end-to-end data systems and pipelines, that other teams and customers rely on</li> <li>Design and implement data integrations across multiple backend business systems, ensuring efficient and reliable data flows</li> <li>Work on streaming data processing using frameworks like Apache Beam to handle real-time data ingestion and transformation</li> <li>Build and maintain APIs to enable seamless data access and sharing across internal teams and platforms</li> <li>Manage orchestration and automation of workflows using Airflow on Kubernetes</li> <li>Define what "correct" means for the data you own, and back it with monitoring, alerting, and integration tests</li> <li>Build reusable patterns and components (hooks, plugins, alerting utilities) that are easily adoptable by other engineers and processes</li> <li>Break down ambiguous work into actionable tasks, surface edge cases and failure modes early, and clarify requirements with stakeholders</li> <li>Communicate tradeoffs, assumptions, and risks clearly in design reviews and PRs</li> </ul> <p><strong>Qualifications:</strong></p> <ul> <li>5+ years of Data Engineering experience</li> <li>3+ years of Airflow experience</li> <li>Expert in Python and SQL</li> <li>Strong working knowledge of our existing tech stack: Snowflake, Airflow, DBT, GCP</li> <li>BS in Computer Science or related field</li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice to Have</strong></p> <ul> <li>Previous work experience in Fintech, Payments, or related industries</li> <li>Experience with managing Airflow on Kubernetes</li> <li>Experience with data streaming (Apache Beam, Dataflow)</li> <li>Experience with automated ETL (Fivetran, HighTouch)</li> </ul> <p data-renderer-start-pos="1033"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Compensation:</strong></p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="1048">The base salary range for this role is&nbsp;<span class="fabric-background-color-mark" data-renderer-mark="true" data-background-custom-color="#fedec8">$160-175k. </span>The salary range displayed reflects an average base salary range for the position across all the U.S. The base salary offered to an applicant could be higher or lower based on each applicant's specific skill set, depth of experience, relevant education or training, etc.&nbsp;</p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="1365"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Location:</strong></p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="1376">This position is classified as REMOTE<strong domestic U.S.</em></p> <p data-renderer-start-pos="1523"><strong data-renderer-mark="true">Benefits:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li data-renderer-start-pos="1537">Market-leading medical, dental, and
